summary.zh: 公元2000年处于冷战后单极化与全球化加速阶段，互联网时代初现，主权民族国家体系覆盖全球，各洲普遍由独立共和国、君主国、联邦与若干特殊行政体构成。以下为按地图区域归纳的当代主要政体骨架，涵盖全球有人居住地区的重要国家、联盟性政体与代表性小国群。
summary.en: The year 2000 CE sits in the post-Cold War, accelerating-globalization era, with the early Internet age emerging and the sovereign nation-state system spanning the globe. The following is a regional skeleton of the modern world, covering the principal states, federations, monarchies, republics, and representative smaller polities across all inhabited regions.

governmentForm.zh: 中华民国（台湾）在2000年前后是实行总统制与五院体制的民主共和国。
governmentForm.en: Around the year 2000, the Republic of China on Taiwan was a democratic republic operating under a presidential system with a five-branch constitutional structure.

socialStructure.zh: 台湾社会以城市中产阶级为主体，工商业者、专业人士与服务业劳动者构成社会核心。农村人口比重已明显下降，但地方宗族、庙宇网络与地方派系在部分地区仍具影响力。原住民族、客家人与闽南族群共同构成多元社会。
socialStructure.en: Taiwanese society was centered on an urban middle class, with business owners, professionals, and service-sector workers forming the social core. The rural share of the population had declined significantly, though local clans, temple networks, and factional politics still retained influence in some areas. Indigenous peoples, Hakka, and Hoklo communities together formed a plural society.

rulingClass.zh: 执政阶层主要由民选总统、行政官僚、立法委员、地方首长及大型企业集团领导人组成。2000年政党轮替后，原国民党长期主导的权力结构开始向民进党与多党竞争格局转变。
rulingClass.en: The ruling class consisted mainly of the elected president, administrative bureaucrats, legislators, local executives, and leaders of major business groups. After the 2000 transfer of power, the long-dominant Kuomintang-led power structure began shifting toward a Democratic Progressive Party and broader multiparty competition.

succession.zh: 国家元首通过全民直选产生，任期四年，可连任一次。行政权和平转移已在2000年首次实现，标志民主继承机制成熟。
succession.en: The head of state was elected by popular vote for a four-year term and could be re-elected once. The peaceful transfer of executive power was first achieved in 2000, marking the maturation of democratic succession.

structure.zh: 中央政府依宪法设总统与五院：行政院、立法院、司法院、考试院与监察院。总统主导国防与两岸政策，行政院负责施政执行，立法院掌握立法与预算审查。省级功能已大幅精简，地方政府以县市为核心运作。
structure.en: The central government was organized under the constitution with a presidency and five branches: Executive Yuan, Legislative Yuan, Judicial Yuan, Examination Yuan, and Control Yuan. The president led defense and cross-strait policy, the Executive Yuan handled administration, and the Legislative Yuan controlled legislation and budget review. Provincial functions had been greatly streamlined, with local administration centered on counties and municipalities.

function.zh: 统筹中央行政、经济、内政、交通、教育与社会政策执行。
function.en: Coordinated central administration and implemented economic, domestic, transport, education, and social policy.

function.zh: 负责立法、预算审议与对行政机关监督。
function.en: Responsible for legislation, budget review, and oversight of the executive.

function.zh: 管理宪法解释、法院体系与司法行政。
function.en: Managed constitutional interpretation, the court system, and judicial administration.

name.zh: 财政部及所属税务体系
name.en: Ministry of Finance and tax administration

function.zh: 负责税收征管、国库、关税与金融监管部分事务。
function.en: Handled tax collection, the treasury, customs duties, and parts of financial regulation.

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政以直辖市、省辖市与县为主，乡镇市区承担基层治理。地方首长与议会多由选举产生，地方派系政治在中南部尤其显著。
localAdmin.en: Local administration was based on special municipalities, provincial cities, and counties, with townships and districts handling grassroots governance. Local executives and councils were largely elected, and local factional politics remained especially visible in central and southern Taiwan.

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系以大陆法系为主，并结合宪政审查与现代行政法机制。戒严时期遗留法制正持续修正，人权保障与司法独立逐步强化。
legalSystem.en: The legal system was primarily civil law-based, combined with constitutional review and modern administrative law mechanisms. Legal remnants of the martial-law era were still being revised, while human rights protections and judicial independence were gradually strengthened.

taxationSystem.zh: 税制以所得税、营业税、货物税、关税与土地相关税负为主。中央税收能力稳定，出口导向经济带来较强财政基础。
taxationSystem.en: The tax system relied mainly on income taxes, business taxes, commodity taxes, customs duties, and land-related taxation. Central tax capacity was stable, supported by a strong export-oriented economy.

culturalAchievements.zh: 台湾在流行音乐、电视剧、出版、半导体产业文化与本土文学方面表现突出。民主化后，本土认同、客家文化与原住民族文化复振成为重要文化现象。
culturalAchievements.en: Taiwan stood out in popular music, television drama, publishing, semiconductor-linked industrial culture, and local literature. After democratization, the revival of local identity, Hakka culture, and Indigenous cultures became major cultural developments.

languageFamily.zh: 主要语言属汉藏语系汉语族；另有南岛语系原住民族语言。
languageFamily.en: The main languages belonged to the Sinitic branch of the Sino-Tibetan family; Indigenous languages belonged to the Austronesian family.

philosophy.zh: 儒家伦理、民间信仰、佛教、道教与现代自由民主价值并存。
philosophy.en: Confucian ethics, folk religion, Buddhism, Taoism, and modern liberal-democratic values coexisted.

writingSystem.zh: 以繁体中文汉字为官方书写系统，并广泛使用注音符号与拉丁字母辅助。
writingSystem.en: Traditional Chinese characters served as the official writing system, with Zhuyin and Latin alphabet aids widely used.

gdpDescription.zh: 台湾在2000年前后属于高收入新兴工业经济体，制造业与出口贸易高度发达。电子、资讯与半导体产业已成为经济增长核心。
gdpDescription.en: Around 2000, Taiwan was a high-income newly industrialized economy with highly developed manufacturing and export trade. Electronics, information technology, and semiconductors had become the core of growth.

mainIndustries.zh: 半导体、电子制造、资讯科技、石化、机械、纺织、航运与金融服务
mainIndustries.en: Semiconductors, electronics manufacturing, information technology, petrochemicals, machinery, textiles, shipping, and financial services

tradeGoods.zh: 集成电路、电脑零组件、机械设备、塑化产品、纺织品、钢铁制品
tradeGoods.en: Integrated circuits, computer components, machinery, petrochemical products, textiles, and steel goods

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富整体较高，住房自有率高，储蓄率亦高，但城乡与世代间资产差距开始扩大。
householdWealth.en: Household wealth was generally high, with strong homeownership and savings rates, though urban-rural and generational asset gaps were beginning to widen.

economicSystem.zh: 以市场经济为主，国家通过产业政策、科技园区与金融监管进行引导。
economicSystem.en: A market economy predominated, with the state guiding development through industrial policy, science parks, and financial regulation.

treasuryDescription.zh: 政府财政基础稳健，外汇储备极高，是亚洲主要储备经济体之一。
treasuryDescription.en: The government’s fiscal position was broadly solid, with very high foreign exchange reserves, making it one of Asia’s major reserve-holding economies.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策总体偏稳健，但在景气波动与政治转型下出现适度赤字与公共投资扩张。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy was generally prudent, though moderate deficits and expanded public investment appeared amid economic fluctuations and political transition.

description.zh: 负责本岛防御、海岸防卫与地面作战，为最大军种。
description.en: Responsible for island defense, coastal security, and ground combat; it was the largest service branch.

description.zh: 负责台海制海、护航与反登陆作战，含陆战队力量。
description.en: Handled sea control in the Taiwan Strait, escort missions, and anti-landing operations, including marine forces.

description.zh: 依靠战斗机、防空飞弹与预警系统实施制空与防空任务。
description.en: Relied on fighter aircraft, air-defense missiles, and early warning systems for air superiority and air defense.

commanderInChief.zh: 总统陈水扁

technology.zh: 军队装备现代化程度较高，拥有美制战机、防空系统、导弹与电子侦测能力，但后勤与军种整合仍在改革中。
technology.en: The armed forces had a relatively high level of modernization, with U.S.-made fighters, air-defense systems, missiles, and electronic surveillance capabilities, though logistics and joint-force integration were still under reform.

threats.zh: 主要威胁来自中华人民共和国的军事压力、导弹部署与两岸政治对立。
threats.en: The main threat came from military pressure, missile deployments, and political confrontation from the People’s Republic of China.

populationDescription.zh: 人口高度集中于西部都会走廊，识字率与受教育程度高。人口老化趋势已开始显现，出生率逐步下降。
populationDescription.en: The population was heavily concentrated in the western urban corridor, with high literacy and educational attainment. Population aging had already begun to appear, while birth rates were gradually declining.

socialClasses.zh: 以中产阶级为主，上层包括政商精英与大型企业家，下层多为基层劳工、服务业与部分农村人口。
socialClasses.en: The society was predominantly middle class, with upper strata made up of political-business elites and major entrepreneurs, while lower strata included wage laborers, service workers, and some rural residents.

allies.zh: 主要依赖美国的安全支持，并与日本及部分非正式伙伴维持紧密经贸关系。
allies.en: It relied primarily on U.S. security support and maintained close economic ties with Japan and various informal partners.

enemies.zh: 无正式宣战敌国，但与中华人民共和国存在严重主权与安全对立。
enemies.en: It had no formally declared wartime enemy, but faced acute sovereignty and security confrontation with the People’s Republic of China.

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交政策以维持实际国际空间、强化对美关系、争取国际参与及稳控两岸局势为核心。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy centered on preserving practical international space, strengthening ties with the United States, expanding international participation, and managing cross-strait tensions.

era.zh: 信息化与高科技工业时代
era.en: Information age and high-technology industrial era

keyInnovations.zh: 晶圆代工、笔记本电脑制造、电子零组件整合、科学园区研发体系。
keyInnovations.en: Semiconductor foundry production, notebook computer manufacturing, electronic component integration, and science-park research systems.

strengths.zh: 经济外向、高科技制造强、教育水平高、民主制度稳步巩固。
strengths.en: Export strength, advanced high-tech manufacturing, high educational attainment, and steadily consolidating democratic institutions.

weaknesses.zh: 国际承认有限、能源依赖进口、两岸安全压力大、内部分裂性政治竞争明显。
weaknesses.en: Limited international recognition, heavy energy import dependence, strong cross-strait security pressure, and pronounced internal political polarization.

outlook.zh: 若能维持科技优势并稳控两岸风险，台湾仍将保持富裕与制度韧性，但安全环境持续脆弱。
outlook.en: If it maintained its technological edge and managed cross-strait risks, Taiwan would likely remain prosperous and institutionally resilient, though its security environment would stay fragile.

description.zh: 完成政党轮替的海岛民主政体，是全球电子产业核心之一。
description.en: An island democracy that had achieved a peaceful transfer of power and was a core hub of global electronics.

dynasty.zh: 后社会主义共和国时期

governmentForm.zh: 半总统制议会共和国，实行多党选举民主与成文宪法秩序
governmentForm.en: A semi-presidential parliamentary republic with multi-party electoral democracy and a constitutional order

socialStructure.zh: 社会由城市居民、牧业家庭、矿业与工业劳动者、国家公务员、私营商人、知识分子和新兴市场阶层构成；在后社会主义转型中，传统草原游牧生活方式与城市化并存。
socialStructure.en: Society consisted of urban residents, pastoral households, mining and industrial workers, state employees, private traders, intellectuals, and an emerging market class; traditional steppe pastoral life coexisted with urbanization during the post-socialist transition.

rulingClass.zh: 执政精英主要由民选政治家、政党领导层、高级官僚、首都知识界和转型时期形成的商业集团组成
rulingClass.en: The ruling elite was composed mainly of elected politicians, party leadership, senior bureaucrats, the Ulaanbaatar intelligentsia, and business groups formed during the transition period

succession.zh: 总统由全民直选产生，国家大呼拉尔议会选举产生政府，总理由议会多数决定，按宪法定期更替
succession.en: The president was chosen by direct popular election, while the State Great Khural selected the government; the prime minister depended on a parliamentary majority, with regular constitutional succession

structure.zh: 国家权力由总统、国家大呼拉尔、总理及内阁、独立司法机构和地方行政单位构成。总统负责国家元首职能与部分安全外交事务，政府负责日常行政，议会掌握立法与监督权。
structure.en: State authority was structured around the president, the State Great Khural, the prime minister and cabinet, an independent judiciary, and local administrative units. The president handled head-of-state duties and parts of security and foreign affairs, while the government managed daily administration and parliament held legislative and oversight powers.

function.zh: 负责对外关系、条约谈判、驻外使团管理以及“第三邻国”外交战略
function.en: Managed foreign relations, treaty negotiations, overseas missions, and the 'third neighbor' diplomatic strategy

function.zh: 负责国家预算、税收政策、财政平衡、国债与国库管理
function.en: Oversaw the state budget, tax policy, fiscal balance, public debt, and treasury management

name.en: Ministry of Justice and Home Affairs

function.zh: 负责警务、监狱、民事登记、法制建设与部分国内安全事务
function.en: Handled policing, prisons, civil registration, legal administration, and parts of domestic security

function.zh: 负责军队建设、国防政策、后备役体系和国际维和合作准备
function.en: Directed military organization, defense policy, reserve systems, and preparation for international peacekeeping cooperation

function.zh: 管理交通、通信、能源网络及与俄罗斯、中国相连的运输干线
function.en: Managed transport, communications, energy networks, and trunk routes linked to Russia and China

name.en: Ministry of Education, Culture and Science

function.zh: 负责学校体系、大学、文化遗产、科研政策与识字率维护
function.en: Oversaw schools, universities, cultural heritage, research policy, and maintenance of literacy

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政分为省、县与首都特别行政单位，中央政府任命或批准地方主要行政官员，地方议会在预算和公共事务上具有一定职能。
localAdmin.en: Local administration was divided into aimags, soums, and the special capital municipality; the central government appointed or approved key local executives, while local assemblies exercised limited powers in budgets and public affairs.

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系以1992年宪法为核心，融合大陆法传统、后社会主义法制改革和现代立法程序；司法独立原则已确立，但执行能力与资源仍有限。
legalSystem.en: The legal system was centered on the 1992 Constitution, combining civil-law influences, post-socialist legal reforms, and modern legislative procedures; judicial independence was established in principle, though enforcement capacity and resources remained limited.

taxationSystem.zh: 税制以企业税、个人所得税、关税、消费税和增值税式间接税收为主，中央财政仍较依赖贸易、矿产与外援相关收入。
taxationSystem.en: The tax system relied on corporate tax, personal income tax, customs duties, excises, and VAT-style indirect taxation, while the central budget still depended significantly on trade, minerals, and aid-related revenue.

religion.zh: 藏传佛教为主要传统宗教，同时存在萨满传统、世俗主义与少量伊斯兰和基督教群体；社会主义时期的宗教压制后，宗教生活在1990年代明显复兴。
religion.en: Tibetan Buddhism remained the principal traditional religion, alongside shamanic traditions, secularism, and small Muslim and Christian communities; after socialist-era suppression, religious life revived notably in the 1990s.

philosophy.zh: 思想文化兼具蒙古民族认同、佛教伦理、现代民族国家观念、民主宪政原则和市场转型时期的务实主义
philosophy.en: The intellectual climate combined Mongolian national identity, Buddhist ethics, modern nation-state ideals, democratic constitutional principles, and the pragmatism of market transition

writingSystem.zh: 官方和日常书写主要使用蒙古西里尔字母；传统蒙古文在文化复兴和教育中重新受到重视
writingSystem.en: Official and everyday writing primarily used the Mongolian Cyrillic script, while the traditional Mongolian script gained renewed attention in cultural revival and education

culturalAchievements.zh: 蒙古在长调、呼麦、马头琴、史诗传统、草原骑马文化和佛教艺术方面具有鲜明特色；1990年代以来，电影、文学、新闻出版和民族文化保护逐步恢复与发展。
culturalAchievements.en: Mongolia was distinguished by long song, throat singing, the morin khuur, epic traditions, steppe equestrian culture, and Buddhist art; since the 1990s, film, literature, journalism, and the preservation of national culture had gradually revived and expanded.

languageFamily.zh: 蒙古语属蒙古语族，喀尔喀蒙古语为国家标准语
languageFamily.en: The Mongolian language belongs to the Mongolic family, with Khalkha Mongolian serving as the national standard

gdpDescription.zh: 2000年前后蒙古经济规模较小，但已基本完成从计划经济向市场经济的初步制度转型。经济高度依赖畜牧业、矿产资源、贸易通道和外部援助，受气候、国际价格和邻国市场波动影响明显。
gdpDescription.en: Around 2000, Mongolia's economy was small in scale but had largely completed the initial institutional transition from a planned economy to a market economy. It depended heavily on livestock herding, mineral resources, trade corridors, and external assistance, and was strongly affected by climate, international prices, and neighboring markets.

mainIndustries.zh: 畜牧业、羊绒与毛纺、采矿、食品加工、轻工业、运输服务和基础能源
mainIndustries.en: Livestock herding, cashmere and wool processing, mining, food processing, light industry, transport services, and basic energy

tradeGoods.zh: 主要出口铜精矿、黄金、羊绒、羊毛、皮革和畜产品；主要进口石油产品、机械设备、车辆、消费品、药品和工业原料
tradeGoods.en: Main exports included copper concentrate, gold, cashmere, wool, leather, and livestock products; major imports were petroleum products, machinery, vehicles, consumer goods, medicines, and industrial inputs

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富分化明显：城市家庭多依赖工资、零售和小型私营经营，牧区家庭财富则以牲畜头数为核心。1990年代私有化后，许多家庭拥有住房或牲畜，但金融资产有限。
householdWealth.en: Household wealth was unevenly distributed: urban families depended mainly on wages, retail trade, and small private businesses, while rural pastoral wealth centered on livestock holdings. After 1990s privatization, many households possessed housing or animals, but financial assets remained limited.

economicSystem.zh: 以市场经济为主、国家调节有限、外资逐步进入的转型型经济体；关键基础设施和部分战略资源仍受国家较强影响
economicSystem.en: A transition economy based mainly on market mechanisms, limited state regulation, and gradually increasing foreign investment, with key infrastructure and some strategic resources still under strong state influence

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库储备规模有限，维持政府短期支付能力但抗风险能力较弱，较依赖国际金融机构支持和预算外部融资。
treasuryDescription.en: Treasury reserves were limited, sufficient for short-term government liquidity but weak in shock resistance, with notable reliance on international financial institutions and external budget support.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策以稳定转型、控制通胀、维持基本公共服务和争取外援为重点，整体偏审慎，但受经济波动和严冬灾害影响较大。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy focused on stabilizing the transition, controlling inflation, maintaining basic public services, and securing foreign assistance; it was broadly cautious but highly exposed to economic fluctuations and severe winter disasters.

description.zh: 以机动步兵、炮兵和边境支援部队为主，承担国土防卫、边境巡控和灾害应急任务
description.en: Centered on mobile infantry, artillery, and border-support units, responsible for territorial defense, border patrol, and disaster response

description.zh: 规模较小，装备老旧，主要承担有限空域监视、运输和训练任务
description.en: Small in scale and equipped with aging systems, mainly responsible for limited airspace surveillance, transport, and training

description.zh: 包括边境警戒、后勤、工程、通信和后备训练力量，在广阔国土上具有重要作用
description.en: Included border security, logistics, engineering, communications, and reserve-training elements, playing an important role across the country's vast territory

commanderInChief.zh: 总统那查金·巴嘎班迪

technology.zh: 军备主要继承苏联体系，装备以旧式装甲车辆、火炮、轻武器和有限航空器为主；重视基础训练、维和合作和低成本防务。
technology.en: Military equipment was largely inherited from the Soviet system, centered on older armored vehicles, artillery, small arms, and limited aircraft; emphasis was placed on basic training, peacekeeping cooperation, and low-cost defense.

threats.zh: 蒙古面临的直接军事威胁较低，主要安全挑战来自地缘上夹处中俄之间的战略脆弱性、边境管理、走私、内部财政约束及对外依赖。
threats.en: Mongolia faced a low level of direct military threat; its main security challenges came from geopolitical vulnerability between Russia and China, border management, smuggling, domestic fiscal constraints, and external dependence.

populationDescription.zh: 人口稀少且分布极不均衡，绝大多数居民为蒙古族，另有哈萨克族及少数其他民族；人口年龄结构相对年轻，但向首都集中的趋势显著。
populationDescription.en: The population was sparse and very unevenly distributed, with most residents being ethnic Mongols alongside Kazakhs and smaller minorities; the age structure was relatively young, but migration toward the capital was pronounced.

socialClasses.zh: 主要社会阶层包括国家与专业技术人员、城市工薪阶层、私营商人与市场经营者、牧民家庭、失业与贫困人口以及少量新兴富裕阶层。
socialClasses.en: Major social strata included state and professional personnel, the urban wage-earning class, private traders and market operators, pastoral households, unemployed and poor populations, and a small emerging affluent class.

allies.zh: 蒙古奉行平衡外交，与俄罗斯和中国维持务实邻国关系，同时积极发展与美国、日本、韩国、欧盟国家、印度及国际组织的合作关系。
allies.en: Mongolia pursued a balanced diplomacy, maintaining pragmatic neighborly relations with Russia and China while actively developing cooperation with the United States, Japan, South Korea, European states, India, and international organizations.

enemies.zh: 2000年蒙古没有明确的国家级敌对对象，外交重点在于避免卷入大国对抗并保持战略自主。
enemies.en: In 2000 Mongolia had no clearly defined state-level enemies; its diplomatic priority was to avoid entanglement in great-power rivalry and preserve strategic autonomy.

foreignPolicy.zh: 对外政策以“第三邻国”战略、主权平衡、争取援助与投资、参与联合国和地区合作机制为核心，在中俄之间寻求安全与经济空间。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy centered on the 'third neighbor' strategy, sovereign balancing, attracting aid and investment, and participation in the United Nations and regional frameworks, seeking security and economic space between China and Russia.

keyInnovations.zh: 技术水平总体为现代但基础较弱，重点体现在苏联时期遗留的工业与电力系统、全国教育普及、移动通信初步发展、铁路干线运营、矿业勘探与城市供热体系。
keyInnovations.en: The technological level was broadly modern but with a weak base, centered on Soviet-era industrial and power systems, nationwide educational attainment, early mobile telecommunications growth, trunk railway operation, mineral exploration, and urban district heating systems.

strengths.zh: 蒙古的优势在于政治制度已较稳定、民族认同强、识字率高、矿产与畜牧资源丰富、地处中俄之间具有战略缓冲价值，并能灵活运用多边外交争取外部支持。
strengths.en: Mongolia's strengths lay in its increasingly stable political system, strong national identity, high literacy, abundant mineral and pastoral resources, strategic buffer position between Russia and China, and flexible multivector diplomacy for obtaining outside support.

weaknesses.zh: 弱点包括经济规模过小、产业单一、内陆地理限制、基础设施薄弱、贫困和失业问题、财政脆弱以及对气候灾害和外部市场的高度敏感。
weaknesses.en: Its weaknesses included very small economic scale, narrow industrial structure, landlocked geography, weak infrastructure, poverty and unemployment, fiscal fragility, and high sensitivity to climatic disasters and external markets.

outlook.zh: 若能维持民主稳定、改善交通能源基础设施、扩大矿业与加工出口并稳健处理与中俄及“第三邻国”的关系，蒙古在21世纪初具有温和向上的发展前景；但短期内仍易受严冬灾害、财政紧缩和国际价格波动冲击。
outlook.en: If it could maintain democratic stability, improve transport and energy infrastructure, expand mining and processed exports, and manage relations with Russia, China, and its 'third neighbors' prudently, Mongolia had a moderately positive outlook at the start of the 21st century; in the short term, however, it remained vulnerable to severe winters, fiscal tightening, and international price shocks.

description.zh: 草原内陆民主共和国，在中俄之间维持转型中的市场政治秩序。
description.en: An inland steppe democracy between China and Russia, maintaining a transitional market-political order.

governmentForm.zh: 议会民主制下的君主立宪制，天皇为国家与国民统一的象征，实权由民选国会与内阁行使
governmentForm.en: A constitutional monarchy under parliamentary democracy, with the Emperor as the symbol of the state and of the unity of the people, while effective power is exercised by the elected Diet and Cabinet

socialStructure.zh: 高度城市化的现代工业社会，以广泛的中产阶级、企业雇员、公务员、个体经营者、农渔业从业者及老龄人口构成，社会流动性较高但仍保留学历、企业资历与地域差异带来的层级
socialStructure.en: A highly urbanized modern industrial society composed of a broad middle class, corporate employees, civil servants, small proprietors, agricultural and fishing workers, and a growing elderly population, with relatively high social mobility but persistent hierarchies shaped by education, seniority, and regional disparities

rulingClass.zh: 民选政治精英、中央官僚体系、执政与主要在野党领袖、大企业经营层及政策共同体中的利益集团
rulingClass.en: Elected political elites, the central bureaucracy, leaders of the ruling and major opposition parties, corporate management, and organized interests within the policy community

succession.zh: 皇位依《皇室典范》实行父系世袭；政府首脑由国会多数派形成内阁并由天皇任命首相
succession.en: The imperial throne passes by patrilineal hereditary succession under the Imperial Household Law; the head of government is formed by the Diet majority and the Prime Minister is formally appointed by the Emperor

structure.zh: 中央政府由天皇、国会、内阁与司法机构构成。国会为两院制，包括众议院与参议院；内阁由首相领导，负责行政；司法以最高裁判所为顶点。地方实行都道府县与市町村自治。
structure.en: The central government consists of the Emperor, the Diet, the Cabinet, and the judiciary. The Diet is bicameral, comprising the House of Representatives and the House of Councillors; the Cabinet led by the Prime Minister handles administration; the judiciary is headed by the Supreme Court. Local government is organized through prefectures and municipalities.

function.zh: 统筹内阁政策协调、危机管理、行政改革与跨部门事务
function.en: Coordinates Cabinet policy, crisis management, administrative reform, and cross-ministerial affairs

function.zh: 负责国家预算、税制、国债、国库与金融监管政策
function.en: Responsible for the national budget, taxation, government bonds, the treasury, and financial regulatory policy

name.en: Ministry of International Trade and Industry

function.zh: 主管产业政策、贸易促进、能源安全与技术发展
function.en: Oversees industrial policy, trade promotion, energy security, and technological development

function.zh: 负责外交关系、条约、驻外机构与对外援助
function.en: Handles diplomatic relations, treaties, overseas missions, and foreign aid

function.zh: 负责教育、学术、文化与体育政策
function.en: Responsible for education, scholarship, cultural affairs, and sports policy

function.zh: 负责公共卫生、医疗、年金与社会福利制度
function.en: Responsible for public health, medical care, pensions, and social welfare systems

name.en: Ministry of Agriculture, Forestry and Fisheries

function.zh: 管理农业补贴、粮食政策、林业与渔业资源
function.en: Manages agricultural subsidies, food policy, forestry, and fishery resources

function.zh: 负责交通运输、港航、航空与基础交通政策
function.en: Responsible for transportation, ports, shipping, aviation, and transport infrastructure policy

function.zh: 主管公共工程、住房、河川治理与国土规划
function.en: Oversees public works, housing, river management, and land planning

function.zh: 统筹自卫队运作、防务规划与日美安保协调
function.en: Coordinates Self-Defense Forces operations, defense planning, and U.S.-Japan security cooperation

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政由1都、1道、2府、43县组成，下辖市、町、村。地方首长与议会由选举产生，但财政上高度依赖中央转移支付与补助金。
localAdmin.en: Local administration consists of 1 metropolis, 1 circuit, 2 urban prefectures, and 43 prefectures, subdivided into cities, towns, and villages. Local governors and assemblies are elected, but local finance depends heavily on central transfers and subsidies.

legalSystem.zh: 以成文法为基础的现代法律体系，受大陆法系影响并融合战后宪政原则，强调法治、司法审查、行政程序与个人权利保障。
legalSystem.en: A modern codified legal system influenced by the continental civil law tradition and postwar constitutional principles, emphasizing rule of law, judicial review, administrative procedure, and protection of individual rights.

taxationSystem.zh: 税收以所得税、法人税、消费税、社会保险缴费及地方税为核心，中央与地方共享税源；1990年代后为应对财政赤字与老龄化而加强消费税与国债融资。
taxationSystem.en: Taxation is centered on income tax, corporate tax, consumption tax, social insurance contributions, and local taxes, with revenues shared between central and local governments; after the 1990s, consumption tax and government bond financing became more important in response to deficits and population aging.

religion.zh: 以神道与佛教并存为主，大量民众在婚丧祭礼和年节中实践混合性民间宗教，同时宪法保障宗教自由，基督教与新兴宗教团体亦有存在。
religion.en: Religion is characterized chiefly by the coexistence of Shinto and Buddhism, with many people practicing a syncretic folk religiosity in rites of passage and seasonal observances; the constitution guarantees religious freedom, and Christianity and new religious movements are also present.

philosophy.zh: 思想文化兼具儒家伦理、和魂洋才式近代化观念、民主宪政、人本主义与企业共同体价值，重视秩序、责任、教育与群体协调。
philosophy.en: The intellectual culture combines Confucian ethics, modernization ideas of Japanese spirit with Western technique, democratic constitutionalism, humanism, and corporate communitarian values, emphasizing order, responsibility, education, and group coordination.

writingSystem.zh: 书写系统采用汉字、平假名、片假名混合，并广泛使用罗马字于品牌、科技与国际交流领域。
writingSystem.en: The writing system uses a mixed script of kanji, hiragana, and katakana, with rōmaji also widely used in branding, technology, and international communication.

culturalAchievements.zh: 2000年前后的日本在电子消费品、汽车工业、动画、漫画、电子游戏、建筑设计、当代文学、电影与流行音乐方面具有全球影响力，同时保存能乐、歌舞伎、茶道、花道与传统工艺等古典遗产。
culturalAchievements.en: Around 2000, Japan exerted global cultural influence through consumer electronics, automobile manufacturing, anime, manga, video games, architecture, contemporary literature, film, and popular music, while also preserving classical traditions such as Noh, Kabuki, tea ceremony, flower arrangement, and traditional crafts.

languageFamily.zh: 日语通常归为日本语系；国内亦有琉球语群等相关语言，阿伊努语为独立少数语言传统。
languageFamily.en: Japanese is generally classified within the Japonic language family; related Ryukyuan languages also exist domestically, while Ainu represents a distinct minority linguistic tradition.

gdpDescription.zh: 日本在2000年仍是世界主要经济体之一，拥有高度发达的制造业、金融业与服务业，但正处于泡沫经济崩溃后的长期调整期，增长缓慢、通缩压力持续、银行不良债权问题显著。
gdpDescription.en: In 2000 Japan remained one of the world's major economies, with highly developed manufacturing, finance, and services, but it was in a prolonged adjustment after the collapse of the asset bubble, marked by slow growth, deflationary pressure, and significant non-performing loan problems in the banking sector.

mainIndustries.zh: 汽车、电子、机械、钢铁、化工、精密仪器、造船、金融服务、零售、电信、建筑与高附加值制造业
mainIndustries.en: Automobiles, electronics, machinery, steel, chemicals, precision instruments, shipbuilding, financial services, retail, telecommunications, construction, and high-value-added manufacturing

tradeGoods.zh: 出口以汽车、半导体与电子设备、机械、钢铁制品、光学仪器为主；进口以石油、液化天然气、煤炭、粮食、原材料与部分消费品为主。
tradeGoods.en: Exports were led by automobiles, semiconductors and electronics, machinery, steel products, and optical instruments; imports were dominated by petroleum, liquefied natural gas, coal, foodstuffs, raw materials, and some consumer goods.

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富总量庞大，储蓄率长期较高，房地产与金融资产占比重要；然而1990年代资产价格下跌削弱了家庭资产增值，老龄化也改变了储蓄与消费结构。
householdWealth.en: Household wealth was very large, supported by a historically high savings rate and significant holdings in real estate and financial assets; however, falling asset prices in the 1990s weakened capital gains, and aging altered the balance between saving and consumption.

economicSystem.zh: 发达资本主义市场经济，以私人企业、出口制造、银行融资、政府产业引导和社会保障制度相结合；在2000年前后，政府采取低利率、财政刺激与金融重整并行的调整模式。
economicSystem.en: An advanced capitalist market economy combining private enterprise, export manufacturing, bank-based finance, government industrial guidance, and social welfare institutions; around 2000, the state pursued a mix of low interest rates, fiscal stimulus, and financial restructuring.

source.en: Customs, stamp duties, and other taxes

category.zh: 债务利息与国债相关支出
地方转移支付与其他行政支出
category.en: Local transfers and other administrative spending

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库管理成熟且信用极高，但受长期财政赤字与巨额国债余额约束，国家财政实力更多体现为征税能力、国内储蓄基础与债券市场深度，而非单纯现金结余。
treasuryDescription.en: Treasury administration was sophisticated and highly creditworthy, but constrained by chronic fiscal deficits and a very large government bond stock; fiscal strength derived more from taxation capacity, domestic savings, and deep bond markets than from simple cash balances.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策总体偏扩张，延续1990年代以来通过补充预算、公共投资与减税刺激需求，同时在税基不足、老龄化负担上升和债务累积之间寻求平衡。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy was generally expansionary, continuing the 1990s pattern of supplementary budgets, public investment, and tax measures to stimulate demand, while trying to balance weak revenues, rising aging-related burdens, and mounting debt.

description.zh: 负责本土防卫、灾害救援、岛屿与地面作战，装备现代化坦克、火炮、防空与后勤体系。
description.en: Responsible for homeland defense, disaster relief, and ground operations, equipped with modern tanks, artillery, air defense, and logistics systems.

description.zh: 负责海上交通线安全、反潜作战、近海防御与舰队护卫，是日本最具技术优势的军种之一。
description.en: Responsible for sea lane security, anti-submarine warfare, coastal defense, and fleet escort, and one of Japan's most technologically advanced branches.

description.zh: 负责防空警戒、战斗机拦截、预警监视与导弹防御准备，维护领空安全。
description.en: Responsible for air defense alert, fighter interception, early warning surveillance, and missile defense preparation, safeguarding national airspace.

name.zh: 联合后勤、训练与机关人员
name.en: Joint logistics, training, and headquarters personnel

description.zh: 包括统合幕僚协调、院校训练、医疗、通信、补给与行政保障人员。
description.en: Includes staff for joint coordination, training institutions, medical services, communications, supply, and administrative support.

commanderInChief.zh: 内阁总理大臣森喜朗（文职最高指挥），经防卫厅与统合协调机构指挥自卫队
commanderInChief.en: Prime Minister Yoshiro Mori as the civilian supreme authority, directing the Self-Defense Forces through the Defense Agency and joint coordinating institutions

technology.zh: 拥有现代化防务工业基础与高电子化装备，重视海空优势、反潜能力、预警雷达、导弹防御研究、通信指挥与高质量训练，但受和平宪法解释和武器出口限制约束。
technology.en: Japan possessed a modern defense-industrial base and highly electronic equipment, emphasizing naval and air superiority, anti-submarine warfare, early warning radar, missile defense research, command-and-control communications, and high-quality training, though constrained by constitutional interpretation and arms export restrictions.

threats.zh: 主要安全压力来自朝鲜半岛局势、朝鲜导弹与核问题、周边海空识别争端、海上交通线脆弱性以及对美国同盟依赖所带来的战略不确定性。
threats.en: The main security pressures came from instability on the Korean Peninsula, North Korean missile and nuclear issues, disputes in surrounding seas and airspace, vulnerability of sea lanes, and strategic uncertainty stemming from dependence on the alliance with the United States.

populationDescription.zh: 人口规模庞大且高度集中于太平洋沿岸城市带，2000年时已显现出生率偏低、老龄化加深与部分农村地区人口流失等长期结构性趋势。
populationDescription.en: The population was large and heavily concentrated in the Pacific coastal urban belt; by 2000, long-term structural trends were already evident, including low fertility, deepening aging, and depopulation in some rural areas.

socialClasses.zh: 社会以中产阶层为主体，包括企业白领、蓝领技术工人、公务员、自营业者与专业人士；同时存在农业与渔业群体、非正规劳动者、学生、退休老人以及少数历史边缘群体，如部落民后裔、在日韩侨与原住民族社群。
socialClasses.en: Society was centered on a broad middle class that included white-collar employees, blue-collar skilled workers, civil servants, self-employed proprietors, and professionals; it also included agricultural and fishing communities, non-regular workers, students, retirees, and some historically marginalized groups such as Buraku descendants, resident Koreans, and indigenous communities.

allies.zh: 核心盟友为美国，并与韩国、澳大利亚、欧洲主要国家、东盟成员及多数发达民主国家保持紧密合作关系。
allies.en: Its core ally was the United States, and it maintained close cooperative relations with South Korea, Australia, major European states, ASEAN members, and most advanced democracies.

enemies.zh: 日本在2000年没有正式宣称的国家敌人，但与朝鲜关系极度紧张，与俄罗斯存在北方领土争议，与部分邻国存在历史记忆与领土问题摩擦。
enemies.en: Japan had no formally declared state enemies in 2000, but relations with North Korea were highly tense; it had the Northern Territories dispute with Russia and experienced friction with some neighbors over historical memory and territorial issues.

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交政策以日美同盟为基轴，重视联合国、多边贸易体制、开发援助、能源安全与海上通道稳定，同时在亚洲推行经济合作与渐进式安全角色扩展。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy was anchored in the U.S.-Japan alliance, while emphasizing the United Nations, the multilateral trading system, development assistance, energy security, and stable sea lanes, alongside economic cooperation in Asia and a gradual expansion of Japan's security role.

keyInnovations.zh: 高密度半导体制造、消费电子、小型化精密机械、混合材料、工业机器人、高速铁路系统、汽车制造工艺、移动通信、光学仪器与先进生产管理体系是日本在2000年前后的关键技术优势。
keyInnovations.en: High-density semiconductor production, consumer electronics, miniaturized precision machinery, advanced materials, industrial robotics, high-speed rail systems, automobile manufacturing techniques, mobile communications, optical instruments, and advanced production management systems were among Japan's key technological strengths around 2000.

strengths.zh: 拥有世界级工业基础、高教育水平、庞大国内储蓄、成熟基础设施、社会秩序稳定、科技创新能力强，并在全球贸易、金融与文化输出方面具有显著影响力。
strengths.en: Japan possessed a world-class industrial base, high educational attainment, vast domestic savings, mature infrastructure, social stability, strong technological innovation capacity, and significant influence in global trade, finance, and cultural exports.

weaknesses.zh: 长期经济停滞、通缩、银行体系不良债权、公共债务上升、人口老龄化与出生率下降、内需疲弱，以及政治更替频繁导致的改革推进困难，均构成主要弱点。
weaknesses.en: Its principal weaknesses included prolonged economic stagnation, deflation, non-performing loans in the banking system, rising public debt, population aging and low fertility, weak domestic demand, and difficulties in advancing reform amid frequent political turnover.

outlook.zh: 2000年的日本整体稳定且国力雄厚，短期内仍将维持全球主要经济与技术强国地位；但未来发展高度取决于金融重整、结构改革、需求恢复、人口政策与其在东亚安全格局中的角色调整。
outlook.en: In 2000 Japan was stable and powerful overall, and in the short term it was set to remain a leading global economic and technological power; however, its future trajectory depended heavily on financial restructuring, structural reform, demand recovery, demographic policy, and adjustments to its role in the East Asian security order.

description.zh: 高科技发达的东亚君主立宪国家，处于平成时代与长期经济调整期。
description.en: A high-tech constitutional monarchy in East Asia, in the Heisei era and a prolonged economic adjustment period.

governmentForm.zh: 中国共产党领导的社会主义人民共和国，实行人民代表大会制度与民主集中制
governmentForm.en: A socialist people's republic led by the Chinese Communist Party, operating through the system of people's congresses and democratic centralism

socialStructure.zh: 社会以工人、农民、国家干部、知识分子、军人、城市企业职工、私营企业主和新兴中产阶层构成，城乡二元结构与户籍制度仍深刻影响资源分配和社会流动
socialStructure.en: Society consisted of workers, peasants, state cadres, intellectuals, military personnel, urban enterprise employees, private entrepreneurs, and an emerging middle class, while the urban-rural divide and household registration system continued to shape resource allocation and mobility

rulingClass.zh: 中国共产党党政干部体系、中央与地方领导层、国有企业管理层及与国家密切联系的技术官僚集团
rulingClass.en: The ruling class was formed by the Chinese Communist Party's party-state cadre system, central and local leadership, state-owned enterprise managers, and closely connected technocratic elites

succession.zh: 最高领导权并非世袭，而由中国共产党党内选拔、协商与组织程序决定，国家主席由全国人民代表大会选举产生
succession.en: Supreme leadership was not hereditary but determined through CCP internal selection, consultation, and organizational procedures, while the President was formally elected by the National People's Congress

structure.zh: 中央层面由中国共产党中央委员会、国务院、全国人民代表大会及其常委会、中央军事委员会、最高人民法院和最高人民检察院构成；地方实行省、市、县、乡多级行政体系，党政并行、以党领导政
structure.en: At the center, the system consisted of the CCP Central Committee, the State Council, the National People's Congress and its Standing Committee, the Central Military Commission, the Supreme People's Court, and the Supreme People's Procuratorate; locally it operated through a multilayered provincial, prefectural, county, and township administration, with parallel party and state structures under party leadership

name.en: General Office of the State Council

function.zh: 协调国务院日常运转、公文处理、政策督办与跨部门联络
function.en: Coordinated the daily operations of the State Council, handled official documents, supervised policy implementation, and managed interdepartmental liaison

function.zh: 负责外交关系、条约谈判、驻外使领馆管理与国际组织事务
function.en: Managed foreign relations, treaty negotiations, overseas embassies and consulates, and affairs involving international organizations

function.zh: 负责国家预算、财政收支、中央转移支付、国债管理与财政政策执行
function.en: Handled the national budget, fiscal revenue and expenditure, central transfers, government debt management, and implementation of fiscal policy

function.zh: 负责宏观经济规划、产业政策、重大建设项目审批和中长期发展布局
function.en: Directed macroeconomic planning, industrial policy, approval of major construction projects, and long-term development strategy

function.zh: 负责国内治安、户籍管理、刑事侦查、边境管理与交通管理
function.en: Responsible for domestic public order, household registration, criminal investigation, border administration, and traffic management

function.zh: 负责基础教育、高等教育、课程政策、学校行政与教育改革
function.en: Oversaw primary and higher education, curriculum policy, school administration, and education reform

function.zh: 负责国家铁路建设、运输调度、铁路企业管理与基础设施扩展
function.en: Managed national railway construction, transport dispatching, railway enterprise administration, and infrastructure expansion

function.zh: 负责电信、电子工业、互联网与信息化产业政策
function.en: Oversaw telecommunications, the electronics industry, the internet, and information sector policy

localAdmin.zh: 全国划分为省、自治区、直辖市和特别行政区，下设地级市、地区、自治州、县、县级市、区和乡镇；党组织书记通常在地方政治中居主导地位
localAdmin.en: The country was divided into provinces, autonomous regions, municipalities, and special administrative regions, below which were prefecture-level cities, prefectures, autonomous prefectures, counties, county-level cities, districts, and townships; party secretaries generally held the leading role in local politics

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系以社会主义法制为基础，融合大陆法系成文法特点，由宪法、法律、行政法规和地方性法规构成；司法机关名义上独立审判，但政治领导和党内纪律体系影响显著
legalSystem.en: The legal system was based on socialist legality and incorporated features of the civil law tradition, consisting of the Constitution, statutes, administrative regulations, and local rules; courts formally exercised adjudication, but political leadership and party disciplinary structures remained highly influential

taxationSystem.zh: 1994年分税制改革后，中央与地方共享增值税、消费税、企业所得税等主要税源，辅以关税、营业税、农业税、土地相关收入和各类行政收费
taxationSystem.en: After the 1994 tax-sharing reform, major revenue sources included VAT, consumption taxes, and enterprise taxes shared between central and local authorities, supplemented by customs duties, business tax, agricultural tax, land-related revenue, and various administrative fees

religion.zh: 国家奉行无神论官方意识形态并实行有限宗教管理，社会中并存佛教、道教、伊斯兰教、天主教、新教及民间信仰
religion.en: The state upheld an officially atheist ideology and practiced regulated religious administration, while Buddhism, Daoism, Islam, Catholicism, Protestantism, and popular folk beliefs coexisted in society

philosophy.zh: 主导思想为马克思列宁主义、毛泽东思想、邓小平理论，同时儒家伦理、实用主义、社会主义现代化观念与民族主义共同影响社会价值
philosophy.en: The dominant ideology was Marxism-Leninism, Mao Zedong Thought, and Deng Xiaoping Theory, while Confucian ethics, pragmatism, ideas of socialist modernization, and nationalism also shaped social values

writingSystem.zh: 以现代汉字为标准书写系统，中华人民共和国通行简化字，辅以汉语拼音作为注音和转写工具；少数民族地区亦使用维吾尔文、藏文、蒙古文等文字
writingSystem.en: Modern Chinese characters formed the standard writing system, with simplified characters used in the PRC and Hanyu Pinyin serving as a phonetic and romanization tool; minority regions also used scripts such as Uyghur Arabic script, Tibetan, and Mongolian

culturalAchievements.zh: 2000年前后中国文化在电影、电视、流行音乐、当代文学、建筑、体育和互联网传播方面迅速扩张；改革开放推动大众消费文化兴起，同时保留书法、京剧、传统节庆、中医和饮食文化等深厚遗产
culturalAchievements.en: Around 2000, Chinese culture was rapidly expanding through film, television, popular music, contemporary literature, architecture, sports, and internet-based media; reform and opening fostered mass consumer culture while preserving deep legacies such as calligraphy, Peking opera, traditional festivals, Chinese medicine, and culinary traditions

languageFamily.zh: 主体语言属于汉藏语系汉语族，官方通用语言为普通话；境内亦分布多种汉语方言及突厥语、蒙古语、藏缅语等少数民族语言
languageFamily.en: The majority language belonged to the Sinitic branch of the Sino-Tibetan family, with Putonghua as the official common language; numerous Chinese topolects and minority languages from Turkic, Mongolic, and Tibeto-Burman families were also present

gdpDescription.zh: 2000年中国经济处于高速工业化和出口导向增长阶段，名义GDP约10,000亿美元，按当年汇率折合约12.1万亿元人民币；制造业、基础设施建设、房地产萌芽、外商投资和沿海开放经济带动全国增长
gdpDescription.en: In 2000, China's economy was in a phase of rapid industrialization and export-led growth, with nominal GDP of about 1.0 trillion US dollars, or roughly 12.1 trillion yuan at contemporary exchange rates; manufacturing, infrastructure construction, early real estate expansion, foreign investment, and the coastal open economy drove national growth

mainIndustries.zh: 纺织服装、电子装配、钢铁、煤炭、电力、机械制造、化工、建筑业、农业、家电、交通运输和初步发展的信息技术产业
mainIndustries.en: Textiles and garments, electronics assembly, steel, coal, electric power, machinery manufacturing, chemicals, construction, agriculture, consumer appliances, transport, and an emerging information technology sector

tradeGoods.zh: 出口以纺织品、服装、玩具、鞋类、家电、电子产品和轻工业品为主，进口则包括石油、先进设备、集成电路、钢材、化工原料和高技术产品
tradeGoods.en: Exports centered on textiles, garments, toys, footwear, home appliances, electronics, and light industrial goods, while imports included petroleum, advanced machinery, integrated circuits, steel products, chemical inputs, and high-technology goods

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富总体仍处于发展中国家水平，但城镇住房私有化、储蓄存款增长和沿海地区创业机会使部分家庭迅速积累资产；农村家庭收入与资产明显低于城市
householdWealth.en: Household wealth remained at a developing-country level overall, but urban housing privatization, rising bank savings, and entrepreneurial opportunities in coastal regions enabled some families to accumulate assets quickly; rural households remained far poorer than urban ones

economicSystem.zh: 社会主义市场经济体制，国家控制金融、能源、电信、交通等关键部门，同时允许民营经济、乡镇企业、外资企业和市场价格机制广泛发展
economicSystem.en: A socialist market economy in which the state controlled key sectors such as finance, energy, telecommunications, and transport, while allowing broad development of private enterprise, township and village enterprises, foreign-invested firms, and market pricing mechanisms

source.zh: 企业与个人所得相关税收

source.en: Business tax and local taxes and fees

source.zh: 国有企业利润上缴、专项收入及其他
source.en: SOE remittances, earmarked revenues, and other sources

category.en: Social security, poverty relief, and health
Debt service, subsidies, and other expenditures

unit.zh: 人民币元（中央财政可支配结余与库款近似值）
unit.en: yuan renminbi (approximate central fiscal balances and treasury cash)

treasuryDescription.zh: 中央财政库款与可动用结余有限，国家整体财力更多体现在税收动员能力、政策性银行融资能力和对国有金融体系的控制，而非传统意义上的贵金属储藏
treasuryDescription.en: Central treasury cash and readily deployable balances were limited, and state financial strength rested more on tax mobilization, policy-bank financing capacity, and control of the state-owned financial system than on precious-metal reserves in the traditional sense

fiscalPolicy.zh: 1998年后中国采取较为积极的财政政策，以发行国债和扩大公共投资刺激内需、应对亚洲金融危机余波，并继续支持国企改革、基础设施建设与西部开发准备
fiscalPolicy.en: After 1998, China pursued a relatively proactive fiscal policy, using government bond issuance and expanded public investment to stimulate domestic demand and counter the aftereffects of the Asian financial crisis, while continuing support for SOE reform, infrastructure building, and preparation for western development

description.zh: 陆军仍为规模最大军种，承担国土防御、边境警备和主要地面作战任务，正从数量型向机械化、合成化方向调整
description.en: The ground force remained the largest service, responsible for territorial defense, border security, and major land operations, and was gradually shifting from a manpower-heavy force toward mechanization and combined-arms organization

description.zh: 海军以近海防御为主，拥有驱逐舰、护卫舰、常规潜艇、两栖舰艇和海军航空兵，重点关注台海、东海与南海方向
description.en: The navy was oriented primarily toward near-seas defense, possessing destroyers, frigates, conventional submarines, amphibious vessels, and naval aviation, with particular attention to the Taiwan Strait, East China Sea, and South China Sea

description.zh: 空军负责国土防空、战术打击和有限远程投送，装备包括歼击机、轰炸机、运输机和地空导弹部队，现代化水平正在提升
description.en: The air force was responsible for homeland air defense, tactical strike, and limited long-range transport, with equipment including fighters, bombers, transports, and surface-to-air missile units, and its modernization was advancing

name.zh: 中国人民解放军第二炮兵

description.zh: 第二炮兵掌管常规与核导弹力量，是国家战略威慑与战役纵深打击的核心组成部分
description.en: The Second Artillery controlled conventional and nuclear missile forces and formed the core of the state's strategic deterrent and deep-strike capability

name.zh: 中国人民武装警察部队

description.zh: 武警承担内卫、要地守护、处置骚乱和部分边防、消防等任务，与解放军分工协作
description.en: The People's Armed Police handled internal security, protection of key sites, riot response, and certain border and firefighting duties in coordination with the PLA

commanderInChief.zh: 江泽民（中央军事委员会主席）
commanderInChief.en: Jiang Zemin (Chairman of the Central Military Commission)

technology.zh: 军队总体处于由苏式体系向信息化、精确化和联合化过渡阶段，装备仍以第二代和部分第三代平台为主，但导弹、指挥通信、电子战和局部海空装备现代化明显加快
technology.en: The armed forces were in transition from a Soviet-style structure toward informatization, precision strike, and joint operations; most equipment remained second-generation with some third-generation platforms, but modernization in missiles, command and communications, electronic warfare, and selected naval and air assets was accelerating

threats.zh: 主要安全关注包括台湾海峡危机可能升级、美国及其亚太军事存在、周边海洋主权争议、边疆分离主义与国内稳定问题，以及高技术战争对解放军传统体制的挑战
threats.en: Major security concerns included possible escalation in the Taiwan Strait, the United States and its military presence in Asia-Pacific, surrounding maritime sovereignty disputes, separatism in frontier regions and domestic stability issues, and the challenge that high-technology warfare posed to traditional PLA structures

populationDescription.zh: 中国是当时世界人口最多的国家，人口仍以农村为主，但大规模农村剩余劳动力开始向沿海和城市流动；计划生育政策显著降低了出生率，同时地区、民族和城乡差异十分明显
populationDescription.en: China was the world's most populous country at the time; the population remained predominantly rural, but large numbers of surplus rural laborers were beginning to move toward coastal areas and cities; family planning policies had significantly reduced fertility, while regional, ethnic, and urban-rural differences remained pronounced

socialClasses.zh: 主要社会群体包括农村农民、进城务工人员、城市工人、国家干部、知识分子、私营企业主、个体工商户、国有企业职工和新兴白领中产阶层；同时存在下岗职工、贫困农村人口和区域发展不平衡问题
socialClasses.en: Major social groups included rural peasants, migrant laborers, urban workers, state cadres, intellectuals, private entrepreneurs, small business owners, state enterprise employees, and an emerging white-collar middle class; laid-off workers, poor rural populations, and uneven regional development were also major realities

allies.zh: 中国在2000年并无严格意义上的正式军事同盟体系，但与俄罗斯、巴基斯坦、朝鲜以及若干发展中国家保持重要战略或政治合作关系，并积极经营与东盟、欧盟、非洲和拉美国家的伙伴关系
allies.en: China in 2000 did not possess a formal military alliance system in the strict sense, but maintained important strategic or political partnerships with Russia, Pakistan, North Korea, and a range of developing countries, while actively cultivating ties with ASEAN, the European Union, Africa, and Latin American states

enemies.zh: 中国官方通常避免将国家公开定义为敌国，但与台湾分离主义力量关系尖锐，对美国在台湾问题、人权问题和亚太安全架构上的压力高度警惕，并与部分周边国家存在海洋与边界摩擦
enemies.en: The Chinese government generally avoided openly designating states as enemies, but relations with Taiwanese separatist forces were sharply antagonistic, it remained highly wary of U.S. pressure over Taiwan, human rights, and the Asia-Pacific security order, and it had maritime and border frictions with some neighboring states

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交方针强调主权与领土完整、反对霸权主义、维护发展中国家利益、争取稳定国际环境以服务经济建设，并继续推进多边外交、加入世界贸易组织谈判、联合国框架合作以及与主要大国的务实接触
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy emphasized sovereignty and territorial integrity, opposition to hegemonism, protection of developing-country interests, and securing a stable international environment for economic development, while continuing to expand multilateral diplomacy, WTO accession negotiations, UN-based cooperation, and pragmatic engagement with major powers

keyInnovations.zh: 重点发展领域包括互联网与电信扩张、移动通信、消费电子制造、高速数据网络建设、卫星与航天计划、杂交水稻、生物技术、核电、长距离输电和大型基础设施工程；同时仍依赖从发达国家引进大量核心技术
keyInnovations.en: Key areas of development included internet and telecommunications expansion, mobile communications, consumer electronics manufacturing, high-speed data networks, satellite and space programs, hybrid rice, biotechnology, nuclear power, long-distance power transmission, and major infrastructure engineering, although the country still relied heavily on imported core technologies from developed states

strengths.zh: 人口规模巨大、劳动力充足、国家动员能力强、基础设施投资迅猛、制造业竞争力上升、政治权力集中且政策执行力较高、对外开放带来资本与技术流入
strengths.en: Its strengths included enormous population scale, abundant labor, strong state mobilization capacity, rapid infrastructure investment, rising manufacturing competitiveness, concentrated political authority with substantial policy execution capability, and inflows of capital and technology through opening to the outside world

weaknesses.zh: 人均收入仍低、地区发展失衡、国有企业改革阵痛明显、金融体系存在不良贷款压力、法治与透明度不足、环境污染加剧、城乡差距和社会保障覆盖不足构成长期挑战
weaknesses.en: Weaknesses included still-low per capita income, uneven regional development, painful SOE restructuring, pressure from non-performing loans in the financial system, limited rule of law and transparency, worsening environmental pollution, and long-term challenges from the urban-rural gap and incomplete social welfare coverage

outlook.zh: 若能继续维持政治稳定、扩大改革开放、完成加入世贸组织并推动产业升级，中国极可能在未来数十年成长为世界级经济与战略大国；但社会不平等、资源环境压力及外部战略竞争将持续考验其发展路径
outlook.en: If it could maintain political stability, deepen reform and opening, complete WTO accession, and upgrade its industrial structure, China was highly likely to emerge over the following decades as a world-class economic and strategic power; however, inequality, resource and environmental pressures, and external strategic rivalry would continue to test its development path

description.zh: 东亚最大国家，改革开放持续推进，互联网与全球贸易迅速扩展。
description.en: The largest state in East Asia, continuing reform and opening while expanding rapidly in global trade and the Internet age.

leaderTitle.zh: 中共中央总书记、国家主席、中央军委主席

ideology.zh: 中国特色社会主义、「三个代表」重要思想、改革开放
ideology.en: Socialism with Chinese Characteristics, 'Three Represents', Reform and Opening Up

relationship.zh: 唯一执政党，实行一党领导的多党合作和政治协商制度。江泽民「第三代」领导集体执政，正在筹备向胡锦涛「第四代」的权力交接（2002年十六大）。
relationship.en: Sole ruling party under one-party leadership with multi-party cooperation and political consultation. Jiang Zemin's 'third generation' leadership in power, preparing for power transition to Hu Jintao's 'fourth generation' (16th Congress, 2002).

description.zh: 2000年的中国共产党拥有约6400万党员，处于从革命党向执政党转型的关键期。江泽民提出「三个代表」理论，试图将私营企业主纳入党的执政基础。1992年邓小平南巡后，中国经济高速增长，但伴随着国企下岗潮和社会转型阵痛。申办2008年奥运会和加入WTO谈判（2001年完成）是这一时期的重大事件。党内以江泽民为首的「上海帮」与胡锦涛代表的「团派」之间的接班博弈正在展开。
description.en: The CCP in 2000 had approximately 64 million members, at a critical transition from revolutionary to ruling party. Jiang Zemin proposed 'Three Represents' theory, attempting to incorporate private entrepreneurs into the party's ruling base. After Deng Xiaoping's 1992 Southern Tour, China experienced rapid economic growth, accompanied by mass SOE layoffs and social transformation pains. Key events included the 2008 Olympics bid and WTO accession negotiations (completed 2001). Succession maneuvering between Jiang's 'Shanghai Clique' and Hu Jintao's 'Youth League Faction' was underway.

role.zh: 党政军最高领导人，「第三代」核心
role.en: Supreme leader of party, state, and military, 'third generation' core

role.zh: 经济改革操盘手，主导国企改革、WTO入世谈判和金融整顿
role.en: Economic reform architect, leading SOE reform, WTO accession talks, and financial restructuring

role.zh: 邓小平指定的第四代接班人，正在等待2002年权力交接
role.en: Deng Xiaoping's designated fourth-generation successor, awaiting 2002 power transition

role.zh: 江泽民核心幕僚，上海帮关键人物
role.en: Jiang's key aide, crucial Shanghai Clique figure

ideology.zh: 经济发展优先、沿海开放、资本市场发展、精英治理
ideology.en: Economic development priority, coastal openness, capital market development, elite governance

relationship.zh: 以江泽民1985-1989年任上海市委书记期间培养的政治网络为核心。2000年仍控制党政军要害部门。即使2002年交班后，江泽民仍将通过军委主席职位（保留至2004年）和安插的亲信继续施加影响。
relationship.en: Centered on the political network Jiang cultivated as Shanghai Party Secretary from 1985-1989. In 2000, still controlling key party-state-military positions. Even after the 2002 transition, Jiang would continue exerting influence through the CMC chairmanship (retained until 2004) and placed loyalists.

description.zh: 「上海帮」是中共党内以江泽民为核心的权力派系，成员多出身于上海的党政系统。核心成员包括曾庆红（中央组织部长）、吴邦国（副总理）、黄菊（上海市委书记）等人。该派系在金融、宣传和安全系统有深厚根基。通过控制人事任命权，在全国各省市安插亲信。与以胡锦涛为首的共青团派形成党内主要权力竞争格局。
description.en: The 'Shanghai Clique' is a power faction within the CCP centered on Jiang Zemin, with members mainly from Shanghai's party-state system. Core members include Zeng Qinghong (Organization Department head), Wu Bangguo (Vice Premier), Huang Ju (Shanghai Party Secretary). The faction has deep roots in finance, propaganda, and security systems. By controlling personnel appointments, it placed loyalists across provinces and cities. It formed the main power competition dynamic with Hu Jintao's Communist Youth League faction.

role.zh: 江泽民的首席幕僚和权力经纪人
role.en: Jiang's chief aide and power broker

role.zh: 上海帮在国务院的核心代表
role.en: Shanghai Clique's core representative in State Council

role.zh: 上海帮地方根据地主持者
role.en: Steward of Shanghai Clique's local base

ideology.zh: 科学发展观（萌芽期）、关注社会公平、注重基层治理
ideology.en: Scientific Development Concept (embryonic stage), social equity focus, grassroots governance

relationship.zh: 胡锦涛由邓小平亲自选定为第四代接班人，1992年十四大进入政治局常委会。2000年任国家副主席，正在为2002年十六大正式接班做准备。团派人脉网络以共青团系统干部为核心，在地方各省有广泛布局。
relationship.en: Hu Jintao was personally chosen by Deng Xiaoping as the fourth-generation successor, entering the Politburo Standing Committee at the 14th Congress in 1992. In 2000 serving as Vice President, preparing for the formal succession at the 16th Congress in 2002. The CYL faction's network centered on Communist Youth League cadres, with broad placement across provinces.

description.zh: 共青团派是中共党内以共青团系统出身的干部为核心的政治派系。胡锦涛1982-1985年任团中央第一书记，其后该系统培养的一批干部形成了松散的政治联盟。团派干部通常具有基层工作经验，强调社会稳定和均衡发展。2000年团派势力尚处于等待接班的蓄势期，核心人物包括胡锦涛、温家宝（未来总理）、李克强（时任河南省长）等。与上海帮的竞争将贯穿整个胡锦涛执政时期。
description.en: The CYL Faction is a political faction within the CCP centered on cadres from the Communist Youth League system. Hu Jintao served as CYL First Secretary from 1982-1985; cadres trained in this system subsequently formed a loose political alliance. CYL cadres typically have grassroots experience, emphasizing social stability and balanced development. In 2000, the faction was in a waiting period before succession. Key figures included Hu Jintao, Wen Jiabao (future Premier), Li Keqiang (then Henan Governor). Competition with the Shanghai Clique would persist throughout Hu's presidency.

role.zh: 钦定接班人，等待2002年正式接掌最高权力
role.en: Designated successor, awaiting formal power assumption in 2002

role.zh: 胡锦涛时代的未来总理人选
role.en: Future Premier candidate for Hu era

role.zh: 团派新生代代表，正在地方历练
role.en: New generation CYL representative, gaining provincial experience

leaderTitle.en: President of the Republic of China

ideology.zh: 民主宪政、台湾本土化、渐进式台独
ideology.en: Constitutional democracy, Taiwan localization, gradual Taiwan independence

controlledArea.zh: 台湾、澎湖、金门、马祖等岛屿，面积约3.6万平方公里
controlledArea.en: Taiwan, Penghu, Kinmen, Matsu and other islands, approximately 36,000 sq km

description.zh: 中华民国国军现役约37万人，装备美制F-16、幻影2000和经国号战斗机，海军拥有基德级驱逐舰等。2000年军购谈判是两岸关系的敏感议题。
description.en: ROC Armed Forces with approximately 370,000 active personnel, equipped with US-made F-16s, Mirage 2000s, and IDF fighters. Navy possesses Kidd-class destroyers. 2000 arms procurement negotiations were a sensitive cross-strait issue.

relationship.zh: 2000年3月陈水扁当选总统，实现台湾首次政党轮替（从国民党到民进党）。陈水扁的当选被北京视为重大威胁——民进党党纲包含台独条款。两岸关系骤然紧张，大陆在选前进行大规模军事演习恐吓台湾选民。陈水扁就职后以「四不一没有」缓和两岸关系。
relationship.en: In March 2000, Chen Shui-bian won the presidency, achieving Taiwan's first party rotation (from KMT to DPP). Beijing viewed Chen's election as a major threat — the DPP platform included Taiwan independence provisions. Cross-strait relations suddenly tensed, with the mainland conducting large-scale military exercises to intimidate Taiwan voters before the election. Chen eased tensions with his 'Four Nos and One Without' after inauguration.

description.zh: 2000年台湾经历了民主化以来最重要的里程碑——首次政党轮替。民进党候选人陈水扁在国民党分裂（宋楚瑜独立参选）的情况下以39%得票率当选。台湾是亚洲四小龙之一，人均GDP约14,000美元，半导体产业（台积电1987年成立）和电子制造业具有全球竞争力。台湾海峡是冷战后亚太地区最危险的潜在冲突热点之一。
description.en: In 2000, Taiwan experienced its most important milestone since democratization — the first party rotation. DPP candidate Chen Shui-bian won with 39% of the vote amid KMT split (James Soong's independent candidacy). Taiwan was one of the Asian Tigers with per capita GDP of about $14,000. Its semiconductor industry (TSMC founded 1987) and electronics manufacturing were globally competitive. The Taiwan Strait was one of the most dangerous potential conflict hotspots in the post-Cold War Asia-Pacific.

role.zh: 首位民进党总统，台湾本土化代表
role.en: First DPP president, representative of Taiwan localization

role.zh: 国民党候选人，败选后成为在野党领袖
role.en: KMT candidate, became opposition leader after defeat

role.zh: 前台湾省长，分裂国民党票源导致政党轮替
role.en: Former Taiwan Provincial Governor, split KMT votes leading to party rotation

name.en: South and North Korea (Divided Peninsula System)

rulerTitle.zh: 大韩民国总统／朝鲜民主主义人民共和国国防委员会委员长
rulerTitle.en: President of the Republic of Korea / Chairman of the National Defence Commission of the DPRK

dynasty.zh: 大韩民国第六共和国／金氏政权
dynasty.en: Sixth Republic of Korea / Kim regime

governmentForm.zh: 分裂的双重政体：南方为民主总统制共和国，北方为一党世袭化社会主义国家
governmentForm.en: Divided dual polity: a democratic presidential republic in the South and a one-party hereditary socialist state in the North

socialStructure.zh: 半岛社会在2000年呈现高度分化。韩国社会以城市中产阶级、企业财阀、专业技术人员、工人和农民构成，社会流动性较高；朝鲜社会则以党、军、保卫机构核心阶层为顶端，按政治忠诚划分的成分体系深刻影响教育、职业、居住和配给。
socialStructure.en: Peninsular society in 2000 was sharply bifurcated. South Korean society was composed of an urban middle class, chaebol elites, professionals, workers, and farmers, with relatively high social mobility; North Korean society was dominated by the party, military, and security core strata, while the songbun classification system shaped access to education, jobs, residence, and rations.

rulingClass.zh: 韩国的执政阶层为民选总统、国会多数派、高级官僚与财阀精英；朝鲜的统治阶层为金正日领导下的朝鲜劳动党高层、军方指挥层和国家安全机构。
rulingClass.en: The ruling class in South Korea consisted of the elected president, parliamentary leadership, senior bureaucrats, and chaebol elites; in North Korea it consisted of the Korean Workers' Party leadership under Kim Jong-il, senior military commanders, and state security organs.

succession.zh: 韩国依宪法通过定期总统选举实现权力和平更替；朝鲜则通过党国体制中的家族继承与精英拥戴维持领袖传承。
succession.en: South Korea transferred power peacefully through constitutional presidential elections; North Korea preserved leadership succession through familial inheritance embedded in the party-state and elite endorsement.

structure.zh: 两韩在形式上各自宣称对整个朝鲜半岛拥有合法性。韩国实行总统制、三权分立与地方自治；朝鲜实行朝鲜劳动党绝对领导下的国家机构体系，由国防委员会、内阁、最高人民会议与党机关共同运作，但实权集中于最高领导人。
structure.en: Both Koreas formally claimed legitimacy over the entire peninsula. South Korea operated a presidential system with separation of powers and local self-government; North Korea functioned under the absolute leadership of the Korean Workers' Party, with the National Defence Commission, Cabinet, Supreme People's Assembly, and party organs operating in tandem, though real authority was concentrated in the supreme leader.

name.zh: 韩国行政各部与总统府
name.en: South Korean Executive Ministries and Blue House

function.zh: 负责国家行政、财政、外交、国防、统一、教育、产业和社会政策执行。
function.en: Responsible for national administration and implementation of fiscal, foreign, defense, unification, education, industrial, and social policy.

name.en: South Korean National Assembly and Judiciary

function.zh: 负责立法、预算审议、司法审判与宪政监督。
function.en: Handled legislation, budget review, judicial adjudication, and constitutional oversight.

name.en: Central Organs of the Korean Workers' Party

function.zh: 负责意识形态指导、干部任命、组织控制和国家重大路线制定。
function.en: Directed ideology, cadre appointments, organizational control, and major state policy lines.

name.zh: 朝鲜内阁与国家行政机关
name.en: North Korean Cabinet and State Administrative Organs

function.zh: 负责计划经济管理、工业农业生产、配给、建设和地方治理。
function.en: Managed the planned economy, industrial and agricultural production, rationing, construction, and local administration.

name.zh: 朝鲜军队与安全机构行政体系
name.en: North Korean Military and Security Administrative Apparatus

function.zh: 负责国防动员、边境管控、内部保卫、政治监督和战备管理。
function.en: Handled defense mobilization, border control, internal security, political surveillance, and war-readiness management.

localAdmin.zh: 韩国分为道、广域市、特别市及市郡区，地方自治在1990年代后恢复并强化；朝鲜则以道、市、郡为基本单位，由党委员会与人民委员会共同管理，地方自主性极低。
localAdmin.en: South Korea was divided into provinces, metropolitan cities, and special cities, with local autonomy restored and strengthened in the 1990s; North Korea used provinces, cities, and counties administered jointly by party committees and people's committees, with minimal local autonomy.

legalSystem.zh: 韩国实行以大陆法系为基础并吸收美国法影响的现代成文法体系，具有独立法院和宪法法院；朝鲜法律体系名义上社会主义法制化，实务中服从党的指令、安全机构和政治需要。
legalSystem.en: South Korea maintained a modern civil-law-based legal system influenced in part by U.S. legal practice, with independent courts and a Constitutional Court; North Korea had a nominal socialist legal order, but in practice law was subordinate to party directives, security institutions, and political necessity.

taxationSystem.zh: 韩国依靠所得税、法人税、增值税、关税和社会保险缴费构成财政收入；朝鲜官方宣称无直接税，但国家通过国营企业收入、贸易机构、外汇事业、计划征购和各种准财政提取实现资源集中。
taxationSystem.en: South Korea relied on income tax, corporate tax, value-added tax, tariffs, and social insurance contributions for revenue; North Korea officially claimed to lack direct taxation, but the state concentrated resources through state-enterprise income, trading organs, foreign-currency operations, planned procurement, and various quasi-fiscal extractions.

religion.zh: 半岛共有深厚的儒家文化遗产。韩国社会宗教多元，基督教、佛教、民间信仰与世俗主义并存；朝鲜官方奉行无神论和主体思想，传统宗教活动受到严格限制，仅保留少量对外展示性机构。
religion.en: The peninsula shared a deep Confucian cultural heritage. South Korea was religiously pluralistic, with Christianity, Buddhism, folk belief, and secularism coexisting; North Korea officially upheld atheism and Juche ideology, while traditional religious practice was tightly restricted and only a few showcase institutions remained.

philosophy.zh: 共同思想底层包括儒家家庭伦理、民族主义与现代国家观。韩国在民主化后强调自由主义、发展主义与公民社会；朝鲜则以主体思想和先军取向塑造政治哲学。
philosophy.en: Underlying shared traditions included Confucian family ethics, nationalism, and modern statehood. Post-democratization South Korea emphasized liberalism, developmentalism, and civil society, while North Korea was shaped by Juche and increasingly military-first political thinking.

writingSystem.zh: 两韩均使用韩文为主要文字，汉字在韩国于学术、法律和历史语境中仍有一定残留，在朝鲜则极少公开使用。南北在拼写规范、词汇选择和政治术语上存在明显差异。
writingSystem.en: Both Koreas used Hangul as the primary script. Chinese characters retained limited use in scholarly, legal, and historical contexts in South Korea, while they were rarely publicly used in North Korea. The two differed noticeably in orthography, vocabulary, and political terminology.

culturalAchievements.zh: 韩国在电影、电视剧、流行音乐、电子媒体和高等教育方面快速崛起，正处于“韩流”对外扩散前夜；朝鲜则在大型团体表演、革命歌剧、宣传美术和高度组织化群众文化上形成鲜明特色。两韩共同继承朝鲜王朝、传统音乐、饮食、陶瓷和文字文化遗产。
culturalAchievements.en: South Korea was rapidly rising in film, television drama, popular music, electronic media, and higher education, standing at the threshold of the Korean Wave; North Korea developed distinctive forms in mass performances, revolutionary opera, propaganda art, and highly organized public culture. Both inherited the Joseon legacy, traditional music, cuisine, ceramics, and literary culture.

languageFamily.zh: 朝鲜语，通常归为朝鲜语系或语言孤立体，南北口语基本可互通但标准语差异扩大。
languageFamily.en: Korean, generally treated as a Koreanic language family or language isolate; spoken varieties remained largely mutually intelligible, though the two standard forms were diverging.

gdpDescription.zh: 2000年的半岛经济呈现极端双轨特征。韩国是高增长的工业化与出口导向经济体，拥有世界级制造业和金融体系；朝鲜则因计划经济失灵、1990年代饥荒后遗症、能源短缺与国际孤立而严重萎缩。合并计算时，绝大多数产出来自韩国，北方占比很小但军工与重工业比重过高。
gdpDescription.en: The peninsular economy in 2000 was extremely dual-track. South Korea was a fast-growing industrialized and export-oriented economy with world-class manufacturing and finance; North Korea had sharply contracted because of planned economic failure, the legacy of the 1990s famine, energy shortages, and international isolation. In combined terms, the overwhelming share of output came from the South, while the North contributed little but remained disproportionately weighted toward heavy industry and the military sector.

mainIndustries.zh: 韩国的主要产业包括半导体、电子、汽车、造船、钢铁、石化、建筑、金融与电信；朝鲜主要包括军工、采矿、冶金、基础机械、化工、农业和有限轻工业。
mainIndustries.en: South Korea's main industries included semiconductors, electronics, automobiles, shipbuilding, steel, petrochemicals, construction, finance, and telecommunications; North Korea's main sectors included armaments, mining, metallurgy, basic machinery, chemicals, agriculture, and limited light industry.

tradeGoods.zh: 韩国主要出口半导体、汽车、船舶、钢铁制品、电子产品与机械，进口能源、原材料、粮食和高端零部件；朝鲜出口矿产、水产品、纺织劳务和武器相关物资，进口石油、粮食、机械和工业原料。
tradeGoods.en: South Korea mainly exported semiconductors, automobiles, ships, steel products, electronics, and machinery, while importing energy, raw materials, food, and advanced components; North Korea exported minerals, seafood, textile labor output, and arms-related goods, and imported oil, food, machinery, and industrial materials.

name.en: South Korean won / North Korean won

householdWealth.zh: 韩国家庭财富以住房、储蓄、养老金和股票资产为主，但受财阀经济和房地产价格影响显著；朝鲜家庭财富形式多为非正式储藏、耐用品、私人小规模交易网络和关系资本，法定私人财产权极其有限。
householdWealth.en: Household wealth in South Korea centered on housing, savings, pensions, and equity assets, though strongly affected by chaebol capitalism and real estate prices; in North Korea, household wealth took the form of informal stores of value, durable goods, small private trading networks, and social connections, with legally recognized private property extremely limited.

unit.en: 2000 international dollars per person per year

unit.zh: 2000年美元（货物与服务贸易总额，合计）
unit.en: 2000 US dollars (combined goods and services trade volume)

economicSystem.zh: 韩国实行国家协调型资本主义与全球市场深度接轨的混合经济；朝鲜实行名义上的中央计划经济，但到2000年已出现配给衰退、准市场活动扩张和军队优先分配并存的扭曲体制。
economicSystem.en: South Korea practiced a mixed economy of state-coordinated capitalism deeply integrated into global markets; North Korea maintained a nominal centrally planned economy, but by 2000 it had become a distorted system combining declining rationing, expanding quasi-market activity, and military-first allocation.

source.zh: 所得税与社会保险缴费
source.en: Income taxes and social insurance contributions

source.zh: 法人税与企业相关收入
国有部门、对外贸易机关与其他非税收入
source.en: State-sector, foreign trade organs, and other non-tax revenue

category.zh: 基础设施、产业与地方转移支付

unit.zh: 2000年美元（合计可动用财政与外汇缓冲估计）
unit.en: 2000 US dollars (estimated combined usable fiscal and foreign-exchange buffer)

treasuryDescription.zh: 韩国在亚洲金融危机后完成一定程度的金融稳定与外汇储备恢复，国库与外汇状况较为稳健；朝鲜的可支配财政资源极其有限，严重依赖军队优先分配、对外援助、贸易特许和少量外汇来源。
treasuryDescription.en: South Korea had achieved a measure of financial stabilization and foreign reserve recovery after the Asian Financial Crisis, leaving its treasury and external position comparatively solid; North Korea's disposable fiscal resources were extremely limited and heavily dependent on military-first allocation, foreign aid, trade concessions, and scarce hard-currency sources.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 韩国财政政策在危机后兼顾金融重组、刺激就业与恢复增长；朝鲜财政政策更接近命令式资源征集，以维持政权、军备、平壤供应和最低限度工业运转为优先。
fiscalPolicy.en: South Korean fiscal policy after the crisis sought to balance financial restructuring, employment support, and growth recovery; North Korean fiscal policy resembled command extraction aimed at preserving the regime, sustaining military capabilities, provisioning Pyongyang, and keeping a minimum level of industry operating.

name.zh: 韩国陆海空军与海军陆战队
name.en: Republic of Korea Army, Navy, Air Force, and Marine Corps

description.zh: 韩国维持大规模征兵制军队，装备现代化程度高，重点在常规防御、空海控制、导弹预警和与美军联合作战。
description.en: South Korea maintained a large conscription-based military with relatively modern equipment, focused on conventional defense, air-sea control, missile warning, and combined operations with U.S. forces.

description.zh: 朝鲜地面军规模庞大，前沿部署密集，拥有大量火炮、装甲和特种作战力量，强调快速突击和纵深渗透。
description.en: The North Korean ground force was massive and densely forward-deployed, possessing large artillery, armor, and special operations components, with an emphasis on rapid assault and deep infiltration.

name.zh: 朝鲜人民军海军与空军
name.en: Korean People's Army Navy and Air Force

description.zh: 朝鲜海空军总体装备老旧，但保持潜艇、快艇、防空和近程攻击能力，辅以大量地下设施和分散部署。
description.en: North Korea's naval and air forces were generally obsolete in equipment, but retained submarines, fast attack craft, air defense, and short-range strike capacity, supported by extensive underground facilities and dispersal.

name.zh: 朝鲜战略、特种作战与后备体系
name.en: North Korean Strategic, Special Operations, and Reserve System

description.zh: 包括导弹部队雏形、特种部队、警备与后备动员体系，是朝鲜威慑和非常规作战能力的重要组成部分。
description.en: This included early missile forces, special operations units, guard formations, and mobilization structures, forming a key part of North Korea's deterrent and unconventional warfare capability.

commanderInChief.zh: 韩国总统兼武装部队统帅／金正日作为朝鲜最高领袖与国防委员会委员长
commanderInChief.en: President of South Korea as commander-in-chief / Kim Jong-il as North Korea's supreme leader and Chairman of the National Defence Commission

technology.zh: 韩国军队拥有较先进的美韩联合指挥、喷气战机、宙斯盾化前夜的现代海军、数字通信和精确打击能力；朝鲜则依赖苏式旧装备、大规模火炮、导弹发展、地下工事、化学武器储备疑虑和数量优势。2000年朝鲜尚未公开拥有核武器，但其核与导弹计划已构成严重关切。
technology.en: South Korea's military possessed relatively advanced U.S.-ROK combined command arrangements, jet aircraft, a modernizing navy, digital communications, and precision strike capability; North Korea relied on older Soviet-style equipment, massive artillery, missile development, underground fortifications, suspected chemical stockpiles, and numerical mass. In 2000 North Korea had not yet publicly demonstrated nuclear weapons, but its nuclear and missile programs were already a major concern.

threats.zh: 最主要威胁是南北之间持续的停战而非和平状态、非军事区附近的高密度部署、朝鲜导弹与核计划、海上擦枪走火风险，以及中美日俄在东北亚力量均衡中的外部战略压力。
threats.en: The principal threats were the continued armistice rather than peace between the two Koreas, dense deployments near the Demilitarized Zone, North Korea's missile and nuclear programs, risks of naval clashes, and broader strategic pressure from the regional balance involving China, the United States, Japan, and Russia.

populationDescription.zh: 2000年半岛总人口约6800万，其中韩国约4700万，朝鲜约2100万。两地民族构成均以朝鲜民族为主，同质性很高，但生活水准、健康状况、营养水平和人口年龄结构已出现显著差异。
populationDescription.en: The peninsula's total population in 2000 was about 68 million, with roughly 47 million in South Korea and 21 million in North Korea. Both societies were overwhelmingly ethnically Korean and highly homogeneous, but standards of living, health, nutrition, and age structure had diverged significantly.

socialClasses.zh: 韩国社会大体可分为财阀与高收入专业阶层、中产白领、自营业者、产业工人、服务业劳动者和农村人口；朝鲜则以核心、动摇、敌对等政治成分划分叠加干部、军人、工人、合作农民和边缘市场群体，国家配给与政治忠诚对社会地位影响极大。
socialClasses.en: South Korean society could broadly be divided into chaebol and high-income professional elites, middle-class white-collar groups, the self-employed, industrial workers, service laborers, and rural populations; North Korean society combined political strata such as core, wavering, and hostile songbun categories with cadres, soldiers, workers, cooperative farmers, and marginal market actors, making ration access and political loyalty crucial to status.

allies.zh: 韩国的核心盟友是美国，并与日本保持安全协调、与欧盟国家维持密切经贸关系；朝鲜主要依赖与中国的战略缓冲关系，并保持与俄罗斯有限接触。2000年南北首脑会晤后，双方在对话层面出现短暂缓和。
allies.en: South Korea's principal ally was the United States, while it also maintained security coordination with Japan and close economic relations with European states; North Korea primarily depended on its strategic buffer relationship with China and kept limited ties with Russia. After the 2000 inter-Korean summit, a brief diplomatic thaw emerged at the dialogue level.

enemies.zh: 两韩彼此仍视对方为主要军事对手。朝鲜同时将美国和日本视为主要外部敌对力量；韩国则将朝鲜政权的不确定性、导弹和核计划视为首要安全威胁。
enemies.en: The two Koreas still regarded each other as the principal military adversary. North Korea also viewed the United States and Japan as major hostile external forces; South Korea saw the North Korean regime's unpredictability and its missile and nuclear programs as primary security threats.

foreignPolicy.zh: 韩国在金大中时期推行“阳光政策”，试图通过接触、援助与合作降低冲突风险，同时维持与美国同盟和全球经济一体化；朝鲜则在危机外交、有限谈判、军事威慑和大国平衡之间求取政权生存与资源输入。
foreignPolicy.en: Under Kim Dae-jung, South Korea pursued the Sunshine Policy, seeking to reduce conflict through engagement, aid, and cooperation while preserving the U.S. alliance and global economic integration; North Korea sought regime survival and resource inflows through a mix of crisis diplomacy, limited negotiation, military deterrence, and balancing among major powers.

keyInnovations.zh: 韩国在2000年已处于信息化与先进制造前沿，强项包括CDMA移动通信、半导体、消费电子、汽车工程、造船和互联网基础设施；朝鲜技术能力集中于导弹、军工逆向制造、地下设施建设和有限核技术研发，但民用科技体系明显落后。
keyInnovations.en: By 2000 South Korea stood near the frontier of informatization and advanced manufacturing, with strengths in CDMA mobile communications, semiconductors, consumer electronics, automotive engineering, shipbuilding, and internet infrastructure; North Korean technological capability was concentrated in missiles, military reverse engineering, underground construction, and limited nuclear research, while its civilian technology base lagged badly.

strengths.zh: 该分裂文明体系拥有高度同质的民族文化基础、战略位置重要、劳动力素质高，并由韩国贡献强大的工业、金融与技术能力；朝鲜则维持高度集中动员能力和显著军事威慑。若实现和平合作，半岛具备巨大的整合潜力。
strengths.en: This divided civilizational system possessed a highly homogeneous national culture, a crucial strategic location, and a skilled population, while South Korea contributed powerful industrial, financial, and technological capacity; North Korea maintained highly centralized mobilization capability and significant military deterrence. If peaceful cooperation were achieved, the peninsula would have substantial integration potential.

weaknesses.zh: 最大弱点是政治制度与经济模式截然对立，战争状态遗留、意识形态敌意、巨额军费、朝鲜经济崩坏、人道主义问题以及核导危机共同构成长期不稳定根源。统一成本潜在极高。
weaknesses.en: Its greatest weakness was the stark opposition between political systems and economic models, with the legacy of wartime division, ideological hostility, massive military burdens, North Korea's economic collapse, humanitarian distress, and nuclear-missile tensions combining into chronic instability. The potential cost of reunification was extremely high.

outlook.zh: 2000年时半岛处于希望与危险并存的转折点：首脑会晤与阳光政策带来有限和解前景，但结构性对抗并未消失。未来走向将取决于朝鲜内部稳定、核问题处理、美中日俄博弈，以及南北能否把民族共同体意识转化为持久制度安排。
outlook.en: In 2000 the peninsula stood at a turning point of both hope and danger: the summit and Sunshine Policy offered a limited prospect of reconciliation, but structural confrontation remained intact. Its future would depend on North Korean internal stability, management of the nuclear issue, the interplay of the United States, China, Japan, and Russia, and whether shared national identity could be translated into durable institutional arrangements.

description.zh: 朝鲜半岛分裂为民主资本主义的韩国与高度军事化的朝鲜，两国并存对峙。
description.en: The peninsula remained divided between democratic capitalist South Korea and heavily militarized North Korea.

name.zh: 东南亚国家联盟及邻近国家联合体
name.en: ASEAN and Neighboring States Confederational Sphere

ruler.zh: 多位国家元首与政府首脑
ruler.en: Various heads of state and heads of government

rulerTitle.zh: 总统、国王、首相、苏丹、总书记及其他职位
rulerTitle.en: Presidents, kings, prime ministers, sultans, general secretaries, and other offices

capital.zh: 雅加达、曼谷、河内、马尼拉、新加坡及其他首都
capital.en: Jakarta, Bangkok, Hanoi, Manila, Singapore, and other capitals

governmentForm.zh: 由主权国家组成的区域性政府间合作体系，成员政体包括共和国、君主立宪制、社会主义共和国、军政主导政体与苏丹国
governmentForm.en: A regional intergovernmental cooperative system composed of sovereign states, including republics, constitutional monarchies, socialist republics, military-dominated polities, and a sultanate

socialStructure.zh: 社会结构高度多元，包含城市中产阶级、农业人口、工业劳工、商业华人社群、土著民族、宗教团体、官僚阶层与军方精英；各国之间发展水平差异显著
socialStructure.en: A highly diverse social structure including urban middle classes, agrarian populations, industrial laborers, commercial Chinese communities, indigenous peoples, religious communities, bureaucratic strata, and military elites; development levels vary greatly between member states

rulingClass.zh: 国家官僚、军政精英、执政党干部、王室成员、大型财团家族与都市 technocratic 管理层共同构成主导阶层
rulingClass.en: State bureaucrats, military-political elites, ruling party cadres, royal families, major business clans, and urban technocratic managers together form the dominant strata

succession.zh: 继承方式因国而异，包括选举、更替内阁、君主世袭、党内任命与军事干预下的权力交接；区域组织本身通过协商与轮值机制运作
succession.en: Succession varies by state, including elections, cabinet turnover, hereditary monarchy, party appointment, and military-mediated transfers of power; the regional organization itself operates through consultation and rotating mechanisms

structure.zh: 整体上为松散的区域协商架构，以东盟部长级会议、政府首脑峰会与常设秘书处为协调中心；各成员国保有完整主权、财政、军队与法律体系
structure.en: Overall a loose regional consultative structure centered on ASEAN ministerial meetings, leaders' summits, and a permanent secretariat; member states retain full sovereignty, fiscal authority, armed forces, and legal systems

function.zh: 协调成员国会议、执行区域合作计划、推进经济一体化与对外联络
