function.en: Coordinates member-state meetings, implements regional cooperation programs, advances economic integration, and manages external liaison

name.en: Foreign Affairs and Summit Affairs System

function.zh: 组织年度峰会、部长会议、多边谈判与对话伙伴关系
function.en: Organizes annual summits, ministerial meetings, multilateral negotiations, and dialogue partnerships

function.zh: 推动自由贸易安排、关税协调、投资便利化与区域产业合作
function.en: Promotes free trade arrangements, tariff coordination, investment facilitation, and regional industrial cooperation

function.zh: 处理跨境犯罪、海上安全、情报交流与地区稳定事务
function.en: Handles transnational crime, maritime security, intelligence exchange, and regional stability matters

name.zh: 文化教育与社会发展机构
name.en: Culture, Education, and Social Development Bodies

function.zh: 推动教育合作、公共卫生交流、文化保护与社会政策对话
function.en: Promotes educational cooperation, public health exchange, cultural preservation, and social policy dialogue

localAdmin.zh: 地方治理完全由各成员国负责，普遍采用省、府、县、市、乡镇等层级；部分国家高度中央集权，部分国家则具有较强地方自治或联邦色彩
localAdmin.en: Local administration is entirely managed by member states, commonly using provinces, prefectures, districts, cities, and communes; some states are highly centralized, while others display stronger local autonomy or federal features

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系多元并存，包括大陆法、普通法、伊斯兰法、社会主义法传统与习惯法；区域层面以不干涉内政和协商一致原则为核心
legalSystem.en: Legal systems are plural, including civil law, common law, Islamic law, socialist legal traditions, and customary law; at the regional level, the core principles are non-interference and consensus

taxationSystem.zh: 税制由各国分别征收，主要包括关税、增值税或营业税、企业税、个人所得税、资源税与消费税；部分国家财政高度依赖石油天然气或国有企业收入
taxationSystem.en: Taxation is levied separately by each state and mainly includes tariffs, VAT or sales taxes, corporate taxes, personal income taxes, resource taxes, and excises; some states rely heavily on oil and gas or state enterprise revenues

religion.zh: 宗教高度多元，伊斯兰教在印尼、马来西亚与文莱占主导，佛教在泰国、缅甸、柬埔寨和老挝影响深远，天主教在菲律宾占多数，越南兼具佛教、民间信仰与社会主义世俗体制，区域内亦有新教、印度教、儒家传统与本土信仰
religion.en: Religion is highly diverse: Islam predominates in Indonesia, Malaysia, and Brunei; Buddhism is deeply influential in Thailand, Myanmar, Cambodia, and Laos; Catholicism is dominant in the Philippines; Vietnam combines Buddhism, folk belief, and a socialist secular system; Protestantism, Hinduism, Confucian traditions, and indigenous religions are also present across the region

philosophy.zh: 政治与社会思想融合国家主义、发展主义、亚洲价值观论述、佛教伦理、伊斯兰社会观、儒家秩序观与后殖民民族建构理念
philosophy.en: Political and social thought blends nationalism, developmentalism, discourse on Asian values, Buddhist ethics, Islamic social visions, Confucian ideas of order, and postcolonial nation-building concepts

writingSystem.zh: 书写体系极为多样，普遍采用拉丁字母，同时存在泰文、缅文、高棉文、老挝文、越南国语字及部分阿拉伯字母和华文书写传统
writingSystem.en: Writing systems are extremely diverse, with widespread use of the Latin alphabet alongside Thai, Burmese, Khmer, Lao, Vietnamese quốc ngữ, and limited Arabic-script and Chinese writing traditions

culturalAchievements.zh: 区域文化成就包括多元饮食传统、海洋贸易文化、寺庙与清真寺建筑、纺织与手工艺、东南亚电影与流行音乐、旅游业发展，以及冷战后区域主义的制度化建设
culturalAchievements.en: Regional cultural achievements include diverse culinary traditions, maritime trading cultures, temple and mosque architecture, textiles and handicrafts, Southeast Asian cinema and popular music, tourism development, and the institutionalization of regionalism after the Cold War

languageFamily.zh: 主要语言分属南岛语系、侗台语系、南亚语系、汉藏语系与苗瑶语系，并广泛使用英语、华语及殖民时期形成的行政语言
languageFamily.en: Major languages belong to the Austronesian, Kra-Dai, Austroasiatic, Sino-Tibetan, and Hmong-Mien families, with English, Chinese, and colonial-era administrative languages also widely used

gdpDescription.zh: 2000年前后，本区域正从1997至1998年亚洲金融危机中复苏。新加坡与文莱人均收入很高，马来西亚和泰国为中等收入工业化经济体，印尼、菲律宾、越南与柬老缅仍以农业、轻工业与资源开发为主，整体呈现快速增长但差异明显的经济格局
gdpDescription.en: Around 2000, the region was recovering from the 1997-1998 Asian financial crisis. Singapore and Brunei had very high per-capita incomes; Malaysia and Thailand were middle-income industrializing economies; Indonesia, the Philippines, Vietnam, Cambodia, Laos, and Myanmar remained more dependent on agriculture, light industry, and resource extraction. The overall pattern was one of rapid growth with sharp disparities

mainIndustries.zh: 制造业、电子装配、纺织服装、农业、渔业、石油天然气、木材与棕榈油、旅游业、航运、金融服务与建筑业
mainIndustries.en: Manufacturing, electronics assembly, textiles and garments, agriculture, fisheries, oil and gas, timber and palm oil, tourism, shipping, financial services, and construction

tradeGoods.zh: 电子产品、半导体零部件、原油、液化天然气、棕榈油、大米、橡胶、木材、服装、鞋类、海产品、汽车零部件与热带农产品
tradeGoods.en: Electronics, semiconductor components, crude oil, liquefied natural gas, palm oil, rice, rubber, timber, garments, footwear, seafood, auto parts, and tropical agricultural products

unitName.zh: 印尼盾、泰铢、越南盾、菲律宾比索、新加坡元、马来西亚林吉特及其他
unitName.en: Indonesian rupiah, Thai baht, Vietnamese đồng, Philippine peso, Singapore dollar, Malaysian ringgit, and others

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富差异巨大，城市中产与跨国商业阶层拥有住房、储蓄和小型投资，广大农村家庭财富主要体现在土地、牲畜、渔船与家族网络；金融危机后许多家庭资产缩水
householdWealth.en: Household wealth varied enormously: urban middle classes and transnational business groups held housing, savings, and small investments, while many rural households derived wealth mainly from land, livestock, boats, and kinship networks; many families saw asset values shrink after the financial crisis

economicSystem.zh: 以市场经济为主，但国家干预程度不一；新加坡具有高度规划性的开放资本主义，越南和老挝实行社会主义导向市场改革，缅甸仍受军政与国家控制影响，区域整体依赖出口导向工业化与外国直接投资
economicSystem.en: Predominantly market-oriented, though the degree of state intervention varies; Singapore practiced highly planned open capitalism, Vietnam and Laos pursued socialist-oriented market reforms, Myanmar remained strongly affected by military rule and state control, and the region overall relied on export-oriented industrialization and foreign direct investment

source.zh: 石油、天然气与资源收入
国有企业、费用与其他收入
source.en: State enterprises, fees, and other revenues

category.zh: 债务偿付与金融稳定措施
category.en: Debt service and financial stabilization measures

treasuryDescription.zh: 财政储备主要分散存在于各成员国央行与财政部；新加坡、文莱与马来西亚储备较强，印尼、泰国与菲律宾在危机后加强外汇与金融稳健管理
treasuryDescription.en: Treasury reserves were primarily held separately by member-state central banks and finance ministries; Singapore, Brunei, and Malaysia maintained strong reserves, while Indonesia, Thailand, and the Philippines strengthened foreign-exchange and financial management after the crisis

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策总体倾向稳健复苏，在危机后兼顾银行重组、债务管理、基建投资与吸引外资；部分国家维持补贴和保护政策，区域层面推动贸易自由化
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy generally aimed at stable recovery, balancing bank restructuring, debt management, infrastructure investment, and attraction of foreign capital after the crisis; some states maintained subsidies and protective measures, while the regional level pushed trade liberalization

description.zh: 以国土防卫、边境驻防、国内治安支援与反叛乱行动为主；印尼、越南、缅甸与泰国陆军规模较大
description.en: Focused on territorial defense, border deployment, internal security support, and counterinsurgency; the armies of Indonesia, Vietnam, Myanmar, and Thailand were especially large

description.zh: 负责海上通道保护、专属经济区巡逻、反走私与岛屿防卫，对印尼、菲律宾、马来西亚、新加坡和越南尤为关键
description.en: Responsible for sea-lane protection, exclusive economic zone patrols, anti-smuggling, and island defense, especially vital for Indonesia, the Philippines, Malaysia, Singapore, and Vietnam

description.zh: 装备以冷战后期西方与苏式飞机混合为主，用于空域巡防、运输、近距支援与有限制空作战
description.en: Equipped with a mixture of late Cold War Western and Soviet-style aircraft, used for air patrol, transport, close support, and limited air superiority operations

name.zh: 准军事、宪兵与内卫部队
name.en: Paramilitary, Gendarmerie, and Internal Security Forces

description.zh: 承担反恐、边防、警备、镇暴与政权安全任务，在缅甸、印尼、菲律宾及越南等国作用突出
description.en: Handled counterterrorism, border security, guard duties, riot control, and regime security, with especially prominent roles in Myanmar, Indonesia, the Philippines, and Vietnam

commanderInChief.zh: 各成员国国家元首、政府首脑或武装部队总司令分别统领本国军队
commanderInChief.en: Each member state's head of state, head of government, or commander-in-chief separately commands its own armed forces

technology.zh: 军事技术水平差异明显；新加坡最为先进，拥有较现代化空军、海军和指挥系统；越南与缅甸保留大量苏式装备；印尼、泰国、马来西亚和菲律宾则混用美制、欧制与本地改装平台。整体具备现代轻武器、装甲车辆、导弹快艇、战斗机和通信系统，但高端联合作战与精确打击能力有限
technology.en: Military technology varied greatly; Singapore was the most advanced, fielding relatively modern air, naval, and command systems; Vietnam and Myanmar retained large amounts of Soviet-style equipment; Indonesia, Thailand, Malaysia, and the Philippines used mixed U.S., European, and locally adapted platforms. Overall the region possessed modern small arms, armored vehicles, missile boats, combat aircraft, and communications systems, but had limited high-end joint warfare and precision-strike capability

threats.zh: 主要威胁包括南海与海域主权争议、分离主义与叛乱运动、跨境走私、海盗活动、宗教与族群冲突，以及大国竞争带来的战略压力
threats.en: Main threats included South China Sea and maritime sovereignty disputes, separatist and insurgent movements, cross-border smuggling, piracy, religious and ethnic conflict, and strategic pressure arising from great-power competition

populationDescription.zh: 区域总人口约5.2亿，是世界上人口最稠密、民族最复杂的地区之一。印尼为最大人口国，越南、菲律宾、泰国和缅甸亦具大规模人口基础；新加坡和文莱人口较少但城市化程度高
populationDescription.en: The region's total population was about 520 million, making it one of the world's most densely populated and ethnically complex areas. Indonesia was the largest population center, while Vietnam, the Philippines, Thailand, and Myanmar also had large demographic bases; Singapore and Brunei had small populations but high urbanization

socialClasses.zh: 社会阶层大致包括政治与军事精英、王室与传统贵族、城市企业家与专业中产、工厂工人、服务业劳动者、小农、渔民、山区与边地少数民族社群，以及非正规经济从业者
socialClasses.en: Social classes broadly included political and military elites, royal and traditional aristocratic circles, urban entrepreneurs and professional middle classes, factory workers, service-sector laborers, small farmers, fishermen, upland and frontier minority communities, and participants in the informal economy

allies.zh: 区域内部合作伙伴为东盟成员国；外部重要伙伴包括美国、日本、中国、欧盟、澳大利亚、韩国与印度，不同国家另有各自双边安全与经贸关系
allies.en: Internal partners were fellow ASEAN members; major external partners included the United States, Japan, China, the European Union, Australia, South Korea, and India, while individual states maintained additional bilateral security and trade ties

enemies.zh: 整体上无统一的单一敌国，但与部分邻近大国存在海洋边界、渔业、领土与战略影响力方面的摩擦；若干成员国内部还面临叛乱组织与武装反政府力量
enemies.en: There was no single unified enemy, but tensions existed with nearby major powers over maritime boundaries, fisheries, territory, and strategic influence; several member states also faced internal insurgent and armed anti-government movements

foreignPolicy.zh: 对外政策以不结盟、地区稳定、经济开放、协商一致与大国平衡为核心，强调通过东盟方式处理争端，并扩大与亚太及全球经济体的贸易与投资联系
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy centered on non-alignment, regional stability, economic openness, consensus, and balancing among major powers, emphasizing dispute management through the ASEAN way and expanding trade and investment ties with the Asia-Pacific and global economies

keyInnovations.zh: 关键技术与制度进展包括出口加工区、电子装配产业链、集装箱港口、移动通信、区域航空网络、石油天然气液化设施、高产稻作技术，以及新加坡在信息化治理和港口物流上的先进实践
keyInnovations.en: Key technologies and institutional advances included export processing zones, electronics assembly supply chains, container ports, mobile telecommunications, regional aviation networks, oil and gas liquefaction facilities, high-yield rice cultivation, and Singapore's advanced practices in digital governance and port logistics

strengths.zh: 优势在于人口规模巨大、地处海上贸易枢纽、资源丰富、劳动力充足、文化多元且具适应性，并已形成一定区域合作机制；新加坡、马来西亚、泰国与越南等经济体提供制造业和物流增长动力
strengths.en: Strengths included massive population scale, location astride maritime trade routes, abundant resources, ample labor, culturally adaptive diversity, and an established framework for regional cooperation; economies such as Singapore, Malaysia, Thailand, and Vietnam provided momentum in manufacturing and logistics

weaknesses.zh: 弱点在于政治制度差异大、贫富分化明显、基础设施不均衡、腐败与治理能力参差、民族宗教矛盾持续、金融体系在危机后仍较脆弱，且区域组织缺乏超国家强制执行力
weaknesses.en: Weaknesses included wide variation in political systems, pronounced inequality, uneven infrastructure, corruption and uneven administrative capacity, persistent ethnic and religious tensions, financial systems still vulnerable after the crisis, and a regional organization lacking supranational enforcement power

outlook.zh: 2000年前后的前景总体积极。若能维持政治稳定、深化区域贸易合作、改善法治与基础设施并妥善处理海洋争端，本区域有望在21世纪初成为全球最具活力的制造、航运与消费市场之一
outlook.en: The outlook around 2000 was broadly positive. If political stability could be maintained, regional trade cooperation deepened, rule of law and infrastructure improved, and maritime disputes managed prudently, the region was well positioned to become one of the world's most dynamic manufacturing, shipping, and consumer markets in the early 21st century

description.zh: 涵盖印尼、泰国、越南、菲律宾、马来西亚、新加坡、缅甸、柬埔寨、老挝、文莱与东帝汶等多样政体。
description.en: Encompassing Indonesia, Thailand, Vietnam, the Philippines, Malaysia, Singapore, Myanmar, Cambodia, Laos, Brunei, and Timor-Leste in diverse political forms.

ruler.zh: 科切里尔·拉曼·纳拉亚南

governmentForm.zh: 联邦议会制民主共和国，中央与各邦分享宪法权力，总统为国家元首，总理及部长会议主导行政
governmentForm.en: A federal parliamentary democratic republic in which constitutional powers are shared between the Union and the states; the President serves as head of state while the Prime Minister and Council of Ministers lead the executive

socialStructure.zh: 社会结构高度多元，由城市中产阶级、农村农民、小商人、产业工人、公务员、专业人士以及历史上受种姓、部族、宗教和地区差异影响的社群组成
socialStructure.en: A highly diverse social structure composed of an urban middle class, rural peasants, small traders, industrial workers, civil servants, professionals, and communities historically shaped by caste, tribal, religious, and regional distinctions

rulingClass.zh: 经选举产生的政治领导层、高级公务员、司法精英、主要政党领导人、地方邦级政治家以及大型工商集团与专业技术精英
rulingClass.en: The ruling class consisted of elected political leaders, senior civil servants, judicial elites, major party leadership, state-level politicians, and influential business and professional elites

succession.zh: 总统由选举团间接选举产生；总理由在人民院中占多数或能组成执政联盟的政党或联盟领袖出任；政权更替通过定期选举和宪法程序完成
succession.en: The President was indirectly elected by an electoral college; the Prime Minister was drawn from the leader of the party or coalition commanding a majority in the Lok Sabha; transfers of power occurred through regular elections and constitutional procedures

structure.zh: 2000年的印度实行联邦制，中央政府包括总统、总理、部长会议、两院制议会、独立司法系统以及各邦和联邦属地政府。人民院掌握主要立法与财政权，联邦院代表各邦利益。中央政府通过各部、委员会和法定机构实施治理。
structure.en: In 2000 India operated as a federation with a Union government consisting of the President, Prime Minister, Council of Ministers, a bicameral Parliament, an independent judiciary, and state and union territory governments. The Lok Sabha held primary legislative and financial authority, while the Rajya Sabha represented the states. Governance was carried out through ministries, commissions, and statutory bodies.

function.zh: 负责国内安全、边境管理、中央警察部队协调、邦际关系及联邦属地行政
function.en: Responsible for internal security, border management, coordination of central police forces, inter-state relations, and administration of union territories

function.zh: 负责预算、税收、关税、金融监管、国债、支出控制及宏观经济政策协调
function.en: Responsible for the budget, taxation, customs, financial regulation, public debt, expenditure control, and coordination of macroeconomic policy

function.zh: 负责国防政策、军队文职管理、军备采购、边防战略及三军行政协调
function.en: Responsible for defence policy, civilian administration of the armed forces, procurement, border strategy, and administrative coordination of the three services

function.zh: 负责外交关系、驻外使团、国际组织事务、条约谈判及侨民事务
function.en: Responsible for diplomatic relations, overseas missions, international organizations, treaty negotiation, and diaspora affairs

function.zh: 负责国家铁路网络、客货运输、铁路建设、运营管理及铁路安全
function.en: Responsible for the national railway network, passenger and freight transport, railway construction, operations management, and railway safety

function.zh: 负责农业政策、粮食生产、灌溉协调、农业科研推广和农村生产支持
function.en: Responsible for agricultural policy, food production, irrigation coordination, agricultural research extension, and support for rural production

name.zh: 信息技术与通信相关机构

function.zh: 负责电信监管、信息技术产业扶持、软件出口政策及数字基础设施发展
function.en: Responsible for telecom regulation, support for the information technology industry, software export policy, and development of digital infrastructure

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政由28个邦和7个联邦属地构成，邦设首席部长与立法机构，地方层面通过县、塔卢卡、乡村潘查亚特和城市市政机构施政。1990年代后宪法修正强化了基层自治。
localAdmin.en: Local administration consisted of 28 states and 7 union territories, with states governed by chief ministers and legislatures. Below them were districts, talukas, village panchayats, and urban municipalities. Constitutional reforms in the 1990s strengthened local self-government.

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系以普通法传统、成文宪法和司法审查为核心，最高法院为最高司法机关，高等法院及下级法院构成分层司法体系；同时保留部分宗教个人法于婚姻与继承领域。
legalSystem.en: The legal system was centered on common law traditions, a written constitution, and judicial review. The Supreme Court stood at the apex, with High Courts and subordinate courts below it; some religious personal laws remained in areas such as marriage and inheritance.

taxationSystem.zh: 税制由中央与邦分享，中央主要征收所得税、公司税、关税和中央消费税，邦则征收销售税、土地与部分地方税费；财政联邦主义通过财政委员会和转移支付进行调节。
taxationSystem.en: Taxation was shared between the Union and the states. The Union chiefly collected income tax, corporate tax, customs duties, and central excise, while states levied sales taxes, land-related taxes, and various local charges; fiscal federalism was managed through the Finance Commission and intergovernmental transfers.

religion.zh: 印度教为多数宗教，同时拥有世界上重要的穆斯林、基督徒、锡克教徒、佛教徒、耆那教徒及其他宗教群体。国家宪法上为世俗国家，宗教生活在公共文化中仍具有显著影响。
religion.en: Hinduism was the majority religion, while India also contained major Muslim, Christian, Sikh, Buddhist, Jain, and other religious communities. The state was constitutionally secular, though religion remained highly influential in public culture.

philosophy.zh: 思想传统融合古典印度哲学、世俗宪政主义、甘地主义、尼赫鲁式社会主义、自由民主理念以及现代科学理性，呈现出传统与现代并存的特征。
philosophy.en: Its intellectual life blended classical Indian philosophy, secular constitutionalism, Gandhian thought, Nehruvian socialism, liberal democratic ideals, and modern scientific rationalism, producing a coexistence of tradition and modernity.

writingSystem.zh: 印度使用多种文字系统，包括天城文、孟加拉文、泰米尔文、泰卢固文、古吉拉特文、古木基文、卡纳达文、马拉雅拉姆文、乌尔都文等；英语也广泛用于行政、法律、高等教育和商业。
writingSystem.en: India used multiple writing systems, including Devanagari, Bengali, Tamil, Telugu, Gujarati, Gurmukhi, Kannada, Malayalam, Urdu, and others; English was also widely used in administration, law, higher education, and business.

culturalAchievements.zh: 2000年前后的印度在电影、音乐、文学、古典舞蹈、宗教建筑遗产、民主选举实践以及软件服务外包方面具有国际影响力。宝莱坞、区域电影产业、板球文化和海外侨民网络共同塑造了其全球文化形象。
culturalAchievements.en: Around 2000 India was internationally influential in cinema, music, literature, classical dance, religious architectural heritage, democratic electoral practice, and software services outsourcing. Bollywood, regional film industries, cricket culture, and global diaspora networks together shaped its international cultural presence.

languageFamily.zh: 主要语言分属印欧语系印度-雅利安语支与达罗毗荼语系，并有南亚语系、藏缅语族等少数语言群；印地语与英语在中央层面具有重要官方地位。
languageFamily.en: Its major languages belonged to the Indo-European Indo-Aryan branch and the Dravidian family, with additional Austroasiatic and Tibeto-Burman languages; Hindi and English held major official roles at the Union level.

gdpDescription.zh: 按名义美元计算，2000年的印度经济规模约为4680亿美元，仍属中低收入大国，但增长势头显著。经济在1991年改革后持续开放，服务业尤其是软件与商业流程外包快速扩张，同时农业仍吸纳大量劳动力。
gdpDescription.en: Measured in nominal US dollars, India's economy in 2000 was approximately $468 billion, making it a lower-middle-income giant with strong growth momentum. After the 1991 reforms the economy remained on a path of liberalization, with services—especially software and business process outsourcing—expanding rapidly while agriculture still employed a large share of the workforce.

mainIndustries.zh: 农业、纺织、食品加工、钢铁、煤炭、化工、制药、汽车装配、铁路设备、宝石切磨、电影娱乐、电信以及软件与信息技术服务
mainIndustries.en: Agriculture, textiles, food processing, steel, coal, chemicals, pharmaceuticals, automobile assembly, railway equipment, gem cutting and polishing, film entertainment, telecommunications, and software and information technology services

tradeGoods.zh: 出口以纺织品、成衣、珠宝、切割钻石、工程产品、药品、皮革制品、茶叶、海产品和软件服务为主；进口则包括原油、机械设备、电子产品、黄金、化工原料和国防装备
tradeGoods.en: Exports were led by textiles, garments, jewelry, cut diamonds, engineering products, pharmaceuticals, leather goods, tea, marine products, and software services; imports included crude oil, machinery, electronics, gold, chemical inputs, and defence equipment

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富分布极不均衡。城市中产阶级在住房、教育与消费品拥有上升趋势，农村家庭则更依赖土地、牲畜和非正式储蓄，黄金仍是重要民间保值资产。
householdWealth.en: Household wealth was distributed very unevenly. Urban middle-class households saw rising ownership of housing, education, and consumer goods, while rural families relied more on land, livestock, and informal savings; gold remained an important popular store of value.

unit.en: US dollars per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 混合经济体制，已从国家主导的许可管制模式逐步转向市场化、私有化和全球化，但公共部门在基础设施、金融、能源和重工业中仍占重要地位
economicSystem.en: A mixed economy that had gradually shifted from state-led license controls toward market liberalization, privatization, and globalization, while the public sector still held important roles in infrastructure, finance, energy, and heavy industry

source.en: Other taxes, fees, and non-tax revenue

category.zh: 邦转移支付与共享税收
category.en: Transfers to states and shared revenues

treasuryDescription.zh: 国家财政并非以单一金库形式存在，而是体现为中央政府现金余额、印度储备银行账户、外汇储备、黄金储备和可动用财政工具。2000年印度财政承受赤字与债务压力，但外汇状况较1991年危机时期显著改善。
treasuryDescription.en: The state treasury did not exist as a single vault but as central cash balances, Reserve Bank of India accounts, foreign exchange reserves, gold holdings, and other fiscal instruments. In 2000 India still faced deficit and debt pressures, but its external reserves were much stronger than during the 1991 crisis.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策在赤字融资、债务管理、基础设施投资和社会支出之间寻求平衡。政府一方面推进税制现代化和经济自由化，另一方面仍保留大量补贴与公共投资责任。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy sought a balance between deficit financing, debt management, infrastructure investment, and social spending. The government pursued tax modernization and economic liberalization while still retaining major subsidy commitments and public investment responsibilities.

description.zh: 陆军为规模最大的军种，负责陆地边境防御、反叛乱行动、高山作战及对巴基斯坦和中国方向的主要威慑部署。
description.en: The Army was the largest service, responsible for land border defence, counterinsurgency operations, mountain warfare, and the main deterrent deployments facing Pakistan and China.

description.zh: 海军负责印度洋海上通道安全、沿海防御、舰队投送和区域海上存在，核心装备包括驱逐舰、护卫舰、潜艇和航空母舰能力。
description.en: The Navy was responsible for securing sea lanes in the Indian Ocean, coastal defence, fleet projection, and regional maritime presence, with key assets including destroyers, frigates, submarines, and carrier capability.

description.zh: 空军承担制空、防空、战术打击、战略运输和边境快速支援任务，装备包括米格系列、幻影2000、美洲虎攻击机和运输机队。
description.en: The Air Force handled air superiority, air defence, tactical strike, strategic transport, and rapid border support missions, using MiG variants, Mirage 2000s, Jaguar strike aircraft, and transport fleets.

commanderInChief.zh: 总统科切里尔·拉曼·纳拉亚南（宪法上的三军统帅）
commanderInChief.en: President K. R. Narayanan (constitutional Supreme Commander of the Armed Forces)

technology.zh: 2000年的印度军队拥有核武器国家地位后的战略威慑能力，技术水平为中上，兼具苏制、俄制、西方和国产装备。导弹计划、核试验后的武器化、卫星和电子战能力持续发展，但后勤、联合指挥和国产化程度仍不均衡。
technology.en: By 2000 India's military possessed strategic deterrent capability as a post-nuclear-test power. Its technology level was upper-middle, combining Soviet, Russian, Western, and indigenous systems. Missile programs, post-1998 nuclear weaponization, and satellite and electronic warfare capabilities were developing, though logistics, joint command arrangements, and indigenization remained uneven.

threats.zh: 主要安全威胁来自与巴基斯坦的长期对抗、克什米尔冲突、与中国的边界争议、跨境武装渗透以及国内多地的叛乱与治安挑战。
threats.en: The main security threats came from the long rivalry with Pakistan, the conflict over Kashmir, border disputes with China, cross-border militant infiltration, and insurgency and internal security challenges in several regions.

populationDescription.zh: 印度在2000年是世界第二人口大国，人口极为年轻且增长迅速。人口分布高度不均，恒河平原、沿海地带和主要农业区密度较高，南北、城乡及地区间在人口素质和社会发展上差异显著。
populationDescription.en: In 2000 India was the world's second most populous country, with a very young and rapidly growing population. Population distribution was highly uneven, with high densities in the Gangetic plain, coastal zones, and major agricultural regions; sharp regional, rural-urban, and north-south disparities existed in social development.

socialClasses.zh: 社会阶层包括政治精英、工商与专业中上阶层、政府雇员、城市工人、小商贩、广大农村农民、无地劳动者以及受宪法保护的登记种姓和登记部族群体。种姓影响虽在法律上被限制，但在婚姻、社会网络和地方政治中仍具现实作用。
socialClasses.en: Social classes included political elites, upper and middle business and professional groups, government employees, urban workers, petty traders, a vast rural peasantry, landless laborers, and constitutionally protected Scheduled Caste and Scheduled Tribe communities. Although caste discrimination was legally restricted, caste continued to shape marriage, social networks, and local politics.

allies.zh: 印度在2000年并无正式军事同盟体系，但与俄罗斯保持传统战略合作，与不丹关系密切，并与孟加拉国、斯里兰卡、尼泊尔、东盟国家、欧盟、美国及日本发展多层次外交与经贸联系。
allies.en: In 2000 India did not belong to a formal military alliance system, but it maintained a traditional strategic partnership with Russia, close ties with Bhutan, and multi-layered diplomatic and commercial relations with Bangladesh, Sri Lanka, Nepal, ASEAN states, the European Union, the United States, and Japan.

enemies.zh: 巴基斯坦是最主要的对手；与中国虽在改善关系，但仍存在战略猜疑与边界争议。印度同时警惕跨境恐怖主义和周边地区的不稳定局势。
enemies.en: Pakistan was the principal adversary; relations with China were improving but still marked by strategic suspicion and unresolved border disputes. India also remained wary of cross-border terrorism and instability in surrounding regions.

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交政策强调战略自主、地区主导地位、发展中国家合作、与主要大国平衡交往以及维护印度洋利益。核试验后，印度努力在承受国际压力的同时争取被承认为重要大国。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy emphasized strategic autonomy, regional primacy, cooperation with the developing world, balanced engagement with major powers, and protection of Indian Ocean interests. After its nuclear tests, India sought recognition as a major power while managing international pressure.

keyInnovations.zh: 印度在2000年前后具有卫星发射与遥感能力、核技术、弹道导弹计划、制药与仿制药生产、绿色革命农业技术以及快速崛起的软件开发和IT服务产业。班加罗尔、海得拉巴和浦那等城市成为科技与外包中心。
keyInnovations.en: Around 2000 India possessed satellite launch and remote sensing capabilities, nuclear technology, ballistic missile programs, pharmaceutical and generic drug production, Green Revolution agricultural techniques, and a rapidly rising software development and IT services sector. Cities such as Bengaluru, Hyderabad, and Pune were becoming major technology and outsourcing hubs.

strengths.zh: 印度的主要优势在于庞大人口与市场、成熟的选举民主制度、强韧的宪法秩序、英语和技术人才储备、农业基础广阔以及不断扩大的服务业和软件出口。
strengths.en: India's chief strengths lay in its vast population and market, established electoral democracy, resilient constitutional order, English-speaking technical talent, broad agricultural base, and expanding service and software exports.

weaknesses.zh: 主要弱点包括人均收入偏低、贫困与文盲问题、基础设施不足、财政赤字与债务负担、官僚效率不均、城乡与地区发展差距，以及宗教、种姓和族群紧张关系。
weaknesses.en: Its main weaknesses included low per capita income, poverty and illiteracy, inadequate infrastructure, fiscal deficits and debt burdens, uneven bureaucratic efficiency, rural-urban and regional disparities, and religious, caste, and ethnic tensions.

outlook.zh: 总体前景积极。若能继续推进经济改革、改善电力与交通基础设施、扩大教育和公共卫生覆盖并控制地区冲突，印度有望在21世纪初成长为亚洲和全球的重要经济与战略力量。
outlook.en: The overall outlook was positive. If India continued economic reform, improved power and transport infrastructure, expanded education and public health, and contained regional conflicts, it was well positioned to emerge in the early 21st century as a major Asian and global economic and strategic power.

description.zh: 南亚最大民主联邦，信息技术产业与多党议会政治并行发展。
description.en: South Asia's largest democracy, combining federal parliamentary politics with a rapidly growing IT sector.

name.zh: 巴基斯坦伊斯兰共和国
巴基斯坦伊斯兰共和国

ruler.zh: 穆罕默德·拉菲克·塔拉尔／佩尔韦兹·穆沙拉夫

rulerTitle.zh: 总统／首席执行官兼陆军参谋长
rulerTitle.en: President / Chief Executive and Chief of Army Staff

governmentForm.zh: 名义上的联邦议会共和国，实际上由1999年政变后军方主导的行政体制统治
governmentForm.en: Nominally a federal parliamentary republic, in practice governed by a military-led executive order following the 1999 coup

socialStructure.zh: 社会由军方精英、文官官僚、地主与工商阶层、城市中产阶级、宗教人士、工人与广大农村农民构成，并存在明显的地区、语言与阶层差异
socialStructure.en: Society was composed of military elites, civil bureaucrats, landed and business classes, an urban middle class, religious figures, workers, and a broad rural peasantry, with marked regional, linguistic, and class divisions

rulingClass.zh: 军方高层、联邦官僚体系、高级法官、主要地主家族及大城市商界精英
rulingClass.en: Senior military leadership, the federal bureaucracy, higher judiciary, major landed families, and urban business elites

succession.zh: 国家元首原则上依宪法程序产生，但2000年实际权力继承取决于军方指挥体系与临时宪制安排
succession.en: The head of state was theoretically determined by constitutional procedure, but in 2000 effective succession depended on the military command structure and provisional constitutional arrangements

structure.zh: 中央政府由首席执行官领导，保留总统职位、联邦秘书处、各部会与省级政府；国家安全委员会式的军政协调机制在实际决策中占主导地位，国会职能一度中断或受限
structure.en: The central government was led by the Chief Executive while retaining the presidency, federal secretariat, ministries, and provincial governments; a military-civil coordination system resembling a national security council dominated real decision-making, and parliamentary functions were suspended or constrained

function.zh: 负责国防政策、军政协调、军费与武装部队行政事务，但实际作战指挥主要掌握在军方总部
function.en: Handled defence policy, civil-military coordination, military budgeting, and administrative affairs of the armed forces, though operational command rested chiefly with the military high command

function.zh: 负责预算编制、税收政策、债务管理、外援协调和宏观经济稳定
function.en: Oversaw budgeting, tax policy, debt management, foreign assistance coordination, and macroeconomic stabilization

function.zh: 负责国内安全、边境管理、治安机构协调、移民与身份证明体系
function.en: Managed internal security, border administration, coordination of law-enforcement agencies, immigration, and identity systems

function.zh: 负责对外关系、驻外使团、双边与多边谈判以及克什米尔相关外交宣传
function.en: Conducted external relations, diplomatic missions, bilateral and multilateral negotiations, and diplomatic advocacy related to Kashmir

function.zh: 负责教育政策、课程标准、联邦教育项目与识字推广
function.en: Oversaw education policy, curriculum standards, federal education programs, and literacy promotion

function.zh: 负责公共卫生政策、疾病防控、基础医疗项目与国际卫生合作
function.en: Managed public health policy, disease control, basic medical programs, and international health cooperation

localAdmin.zh: 国家实行联邦制，下辖旁遮普、信德、西北边境省和俾路支省，以及联邦直辖部族地区、首都地区和北方地区；2000年前后地方治理正朝军方支持的地方政府改革方向调整，以削弱传统政党与省级精英影响
localAdmin.en: The state was federal, comprising Punjab, Sindh, the North-West Frontier Province, and Balochistan, along with the Federally Administered Tribal Areas, the Capital Territory, and the Northern Areas; around 2000 local administration was being reshaped through military-backed local government reforms aimed at reducing the influence of traditional parties and provincial elites

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系混合英国普通法传统、成文法、伊斯兰法原则与军事临时法令；高等法院和最高法院继续运作，但在政变后司法独立面临压力
legalSystem.en: The legal system combined British common law tradition, statutory law, Islamic legal principles, and military provisional orders; the high courts and Supreme Court continued to function, but judicial independence faced pressure after the coup

taxationSystem.zh: 税收以关税、销售税、所得税、公司税和消费税为主，联邦征收占主导地位；税基狭窄、逃税普遍、农业收入征税有限，使财政高度依赖间接税和外部融资
taxationSystem.en: Taxation relied mainly on customs duties, sales tax, income tax, corporate tax, and excise duties, with the federal government dominant in collection; a narrow tax base, widespread evasion, and limited agricultural income taxation made public finance heavily dependent on indirect taxes and external financing

religion.zh: 伊斯兰教为国教，绝大多数居民为穆斯林，以逊尼派为主，什叶派占重要少数；宗教在国家认同、法律与公共生活中具有核心地位，同时少数印度教徒、基督徒、锡克教徒及其他群体继续存在
religion.en: Islam was the state religion, and the overwhelming majority of the population was Muslim, predominantly Sunni with a significant Shia minority; religion held a central place in national identity, law, and public life, while Hindu, Christian, Sikh, and other minorities remained present

philosophy.zh: 主流思想融合伊斯兰政治理念、巴基斯坦民族主义、后殖民国家建构、军方秩序观念与有限的议会民主传统
philosophy.en: Mainstream thought blended Islamic political ideas, Pakistani nationalism, postcolonial state-building, military concepts of order, and a limited parliamentary democratic tradition

writingSystem.zh: 主要书写系统为阿拉伯字母的波斯-乌尔都变体，乌尔都语为国家语言；英语广泛用于政府、司法、高等教育与商业；各省亦使用旁遮普语、信德语、普什图语、俾路支语等文字传统
writingSystem.en: The principal writing system was the Perso-Arabic script in its Urdu form, with Urdu serving as the national language; English was widely used in government, law, higher education, and business; provincial languages such as Punjabi, Sindhi, Pashto, and Balochi also maintained written traditions

culturalAchievements.zh: 巴基斯坦在乌尔都文学、伊斯兰建筑、卡瓦利音乐、电视戏剧、板球文化、纺织工艺与南亚穆斯林知识传统方面具有显著成就；拉合尔、卡拉奇和伊斯兰堡为重要文化中心
culturalAchievements.en: Pakistan possessed notable achievements in Urdu literature, Islamic architecture, qawwali music, television drama, cricket culture, textile crafts, and the intellectual traditions of South Asian Muslims; Lahore, Karachi, and Islamabad were major cultural centers

languageFamily.zh: 主要语言分属印欧语系印度-伊朗语族，包括乌尔都语、旁遮普语、信德语、普什图语和俾路支语；另有达尔德语支、布拉灰语等语言
languageFamily.en: Most major languages belonged to the Indo-European family, especially the Indo-Iranian branch, including Urdu, Punjabi, Sindhi, Pashto, and Balochi; Dardic languages and Brahui were also present

gdpDescription.zh: 2000年前后巴基斯坦经济规模属中低收入大型发展中经济体，受制于外债、国际制裁、政治不稳定、贫弱税基与基础设施瓶颈；同时拥有庞大农业基础、纺织出口能力和海外汇款来源
gdpDescription.en: Around 2000 Pakistan was a large lower-middle-income developing economy constrained by external debt, international sanctions, political instability, a weak tax base, and infrastructure bottlenecks; at the same time it possessed a substantial agricultural base, textile export capacity, and remittance inflows

mainIndustries.zh: 农业、纺织与服装、棉花加工、食品加工、水泥、化肥、皮革、轻工业、银行业、航运与小规模军工生产
mainIndustries.en: Agriculture, textiles and garments, cotton processing, food processing, cement, fertilizer, leather, light manufacturing, banking, shipping, and limited defence production

tradeGoods.zh: 主要出口棉纱、纺织品、服装、皮革制品、大米、运动用品和地毯；主要进口石油、机械、化工品、运输设备、电子产品与工业原料
tradeGoods.en: Major exports included cotton yarn, textiles, garments, leather goods, rice, sporting goods, and carpets; major imports included petroleum, machinery, chemicals, transport equipment, electronics, and industrial inputs

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富分布高度不均，城市工商阶层与大地主拥有相对可观资产，而多数农村家庭和城市非正规就业者资产有限，储蓄常以现金、黄金饰品、土地和家族网络形式保存
householdWealth.en: Household wealth was highly unequal, with urban commercial groups and major landlords holding comparatively substantial assets while most rural families and urban informal workers possessed limited wealth, often stored in cash, gold jewelry, land, and family networks

economicSystem.zh: 混合经济，具有市场化私营部门、重要国有企业、农业地主结构和依赖国际金融机构支持的宏观调整政策
economicSystem.en: A mixed economy with a market-oriented private sector, significant state-owned enterprises, agrarian landlord structures, and macroeconomic adjustment policies dependent on international financial institutions

treasuryDescription.zh: 中央财政现金缓冲有限，外汇储备脆弱，财政稳定很大程度依赖债务展期、外援、汇款与进口管理
treasuryDescription.en: The central fiscal cash buffer was limited, foreign exchange reserves were fragile, and fiscal stability depended heavily on debt rescheduling, foreign aid, remittances, and import management

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策以赤字控制、税制改革、争取国际金融机构支持、维持国防开支和稳定汇率为核心，但受政治合法性不足与社会需求增长掣肘
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy centered on deficit control, tax reform, securing support from international financial institutions, sustaining defence expenditure, and maintaining exchange-rate stability, but it was constrained by limited political legitimacy and growing social demands

description.zh: 陆军是国家最重要的武装力量与政治力量核心，负责对印常规威慑、克什米尔方向部署、边境安全与国内支援任务
description.en: The army was the state's most important military service and the core political force, responsible for conventional deterrence against India, deployments along the Kashmir front, border security, and domestic support missions

description.zh: 空军承担防空、对地支援、战略威慑支援与战备巡逻，装备美制与中法系混合机队
description.en: The air force handled air defence, ground support, support for strategic deterrence, and readiness patrols, operating a mixed fleet of American, Chinese, and French-origin aircraft

description.zh: 海军规模较小，主要负责阿拉伯海沿岸防御、港口保护、海上交通线安全与潜艇威慑
description.en: The navy was comparatively small and focused on Arabian Sea coastal defence, port protection, sea-lane security, and submarine deterrence

commanderInChief.zh: 佩尔韦兹·穆沙拉夫

technology.zh: 军队拥有现代化常规武器体系、导弹项目和已证明的核武能力，但后勤、维护能力、国产化程度与高端电子战体系仍受财政和制裁限制
technology.en: The military possessed modern conventional weapons, missile programs, and a demonstrated nuclear weapons capability, though logistics, maintenance capacity, indigenization, and advanced electronic warfare systems remained constrained by finances and sanctions

threats.zh: 主要威胁来自与印度的长期敌对、克什米尔冲突、边境摩擦、阿富汗方向的不稳定外溢、宗派暴力与国内武装组织活动
threats.en: Primary threats came from long-term hostility with India, the Kashmir conflict, border friction, spillover instability from Afghanistan, sectarian violence, and the activity of domestic militant organizations

populationDescription.zh: 人口约1.38亿，是当时世界人口大国之一，年轻人口比例高，增长迅速，地区分布以旁遮普最为密集，卡拉奇等城市吸纳大量移民与流动人口
populationDescription.en: With about 138 million people, Pakistan was one of the world's more populous states at the time, with a youthful and rapidly growing population; settlement was densest in Punjab, while cities such as Karachi absorbed large migrant and mobile populations

socialClasses.zh: 上层包括军官集团、大地主、工业金融家和高级官僚；中层包括专业人士、小企业主、教师与城市白领；下层包括农业佃户、小农、产业工人、非正规部门劳动者和失业人口。宗族、宗派、族群与地区身份对社会流动影响显著
socialClasses.en: The upper strata included the officer corps, large landlords, industrial and financial magnates, and senior bureaucrats; the middle strata included professionals, small business owners, teachers, and urban white-collar workers; the lower strata included tenant farmers, smallholders, industrial laborers, informal-sector workers, and the unemployed. Clan, sectarian, ethnic, and regional identities strongly shaped social mobility

allies.zh: 主要伙伴包括中国、沙特阿拉伯、阿联酋及部分伊斯兰国家；同时与美国保持复杂但重要的安全与外交接触
allies.en: Principal partners included China, Saudi Arabia, the United Arab Emirates, and several Islamic states; Pakistan also maintained a complex but important security and diplomatic relationship with the United States

enemies.zh: 主要对手是印度；与阿富汗塔利班问题相关的国际压力、与伊朗在部分边境和地区事务上的摩擦，以及与西方国家因核项目和政变引发的紧张也构成外交挑战
enemies.en: The principal rival was India; international pressure linked to the Taliban issue in Afghanistan, frictions with Iran in some border and regional matters, and tensions with Western states over the nuclear program and the coup also posed diplomatic challenges

foreignPolicy.zh: 对外政策以制衡印度、争取克什米尔问题国际化、维持与中国和海湾国家的战略联系、避免全面国际孤立、并在核威慑与经济援助之间寻求平衡为核心
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy centered on balancing India, seeking international attention to the Kashmir issue, preserving strategic ties with China and the Gulf states, avoiding complete international isolation, and balancing nuclear deterrence with the need for economic assistance

keyInnovations.zh: 关键技术能力包括核武器与相关运载系统、弹道导弹项目、军用航空维护、灌溉农业体系、纺织工业生产、通信网络扩展及不断发展的软件与工程教育基础
keyInnovations.en: Key technological capabilities included nuclear weapons and related delivery systems, ballistic missile programs, military aviation maintenance, irrigated agriculture, textile industrial production, expanding communications networks, and a developing base in software and engineering education

strengths.zh: 战略位置重要，军队组织严密，拥有核威慑，与中国及海湾国家关系较强，农业基础广阔，纺织出口和海外汇款提供支撑，国家认同在安全议题上具有较强动员力
strengths.en: Pakistan's strengths included its strategic location, highly organized military, nuclear deterrent, strong ties with China and Gulf states, broad agricultural base, support from textile exports and overseas remittances, and a national identity capable of strong mobilization on security issues

weaknesses.zh: 政治制度脆弱，军政失衡，债务和财政压力沉重，教育与卫生投入不足，贫富差距和地区差异明显，宗派与族群暴力持续，民主合法性和法治受到削弱
weaknesses.en: Its weaknesses included fragile political institutions, civil-military imbalance, heavy debt and fiscal pressure, inadequate investment in education and health, clear inequality and regional disparities, persistent sectarian and ethnic violence, and weakened democratic legitimacy and rule of law

outlook.zh: 2000年的巴基斯坦处于高风险转折点：若能恢复稳定治理、改善财政和吸引外资，则有望维持安全国家与区域中等强国地位；若印巴危机升级、国内极端主义扩张或经济失衡加深，则将面临长期不稳定
outlook.en: In 2000 Pakistan stood at a high-risk turning point: if it could restore stable governance, improve public finance, and attract investment, it could maintain its position as a security state and regional middle power; if Indo-Pakistani crises intensified, domestic extremism expanded, or economic imbalances deepened, it would face prolonged instability

description.zh: 在1999年军事政变后进入军方主导统治，并与印度持续紧张。
description.en: After the 1999 coup, the state was under military-led rule amid continuing tensions with India.

dynasty.zh: 孟加拉人民共和国时期

governmentForm.zh: 议会民主制下的单一制共和国，名义国家元首为总统，行政权由总理及内阁主导
governmentForm.en: A unitary parliamentary republic in which the president serves as formal head of state while executive power is led by the prime minister and cabinet

socialStructure.zh: 社会以农村人口为主，但城市化加速；地主、商人、工业资本家、公务员、专业人士、工人和小农并存，宗教与家族网络对社会组织仍具重要影响
socialStructure.en: Society remained predominantly rural but was urbanizing quickly; landholders, merchants, industrial capitalists, civil servants, professionals, workers, and small farmers coexisted, while religious and kinship networks remained important to social organization

rulingClass.zh: 民选政治精英、官僚体系、高级军官、工商界领袖与地方权势家族
rulingClass.en: Elected political elites, the civil bureaucracy, senior military officers, business leaders, and influential local families

succession.zh: 政府通过议会选举形成，总理由议会多数派或执政联盟领袖出任；总统依宪法程序间接或经议会机制产生
succession.en: Governments were formed through parliamentary elections, with the prime minister drawn from the majority party or ruling coalition; the president was selected through constitutional parliamentary procedures

structure.zh: 中央政府由总理、内阁、国民议会、总统府、最高法院及常设公务员体系构成；地方层级包括专区、县、乌帕齐拉和联合理事会
structure.en: The central government consisted of the prime minister, cabinet, Jatiya Sangsad, presidency, Supreme Court, and a permanent civil service; local administration was organized through divisions, districts, upazilas, and union councils

function.zh: 编制预算、税收政策、财政管理、外援协调与公共债务管理
function.en: Budget preparation, tax policy, fiscal management, foreign aid coordination, and public debt administration

function.zh: 负责国内治安、警务、边防协调、监狱与内部安全
function.en: Domestic order, policing, border coordination, prisons, and internal security

function.zh: 统筹国防政策、军政协调与武装力量行政管理
function.en: Defense policy, civil-military coordination, and administrative oversight of the armed forces

function.zh: 粮食生产、灌溉政策、农业推广与农村发展支持
function.en: Food production, irrigation policy, agricultural extension, and support for rural development

function.zh: 出口促进、贸易谈判、进口监管与产业商业政策
function.en: Export promotion, trade negotiations, import regulation, and commercial policy

function.zh: 学校体系、高等教育管理、课程政策与识字计划
function.en: School systems, higher education administration, curriculum policy, and literacy programs

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政实行中央监督下的分级管理，专区长官与县行政长官多来自国家公务员体系，基层由民选联合理事会和市政机构承担部分公共事务
localAdmin.en: Local administration operated through a hierarchical system under central supervision, with divisional and district officers largely drawn from the civil service, while elected union councils and municipal bodies handled part of local public affairs

legalSystem.zh: 以普通法传统为主，结合宪法、议会立法、行政法规和部分个人身份事务中的宗教法实践；最高法院拥有司法审查权
legalSystem.en: The legal system was based mainly on common law traditions, combined with the constitution, parliamentary statutes, administrative regulations, and religious law in parts of personal status matters; the Supreme Court possessed judicial review authority

taxationSystem.zh: 税收以关税、增值税、消费税、所得税和企业税为主，征管能力有限，外贸税与间接税在财政中占较高比重
taxationSystem.en: Taxation relied on customs duties, value-added tax, excise taxes, income tax, and corporate taxation, though collection capacity was limited, and trade taxes and indirect taxes formed a significant share of revenue

religion.zh: 以逊尼派伊斯兰教为主，同时有重要的印度教、佛教和基督教少数群体；宗教节庆深刻影响社会生活与公共节律
religion.en: Sunni Islam predominated, alongside significant Hindu, Buddhist, and Christian minorities; religious festivals strongly shaped social life and the public calendar

philosophy.zh: 国家文化兼具孟加拉民族主义、伊斯兰社会价值、世俗宪政传统以及语言运动所形成的文化自觉
philosophy.en: The country's intellectual life combined Bengali nationalism, Islamic social values, secular constitutional traditions, and the cultural consciousness shaped by the Language Movement

writingSystem.zh: 主要使用孟加拉文书写系统，政府、文学、教育和媒体广泛采用；英语在高等行政、法律和商业领域仍具重要地位
writingSystem.en: The Bengali script was the principal writing system used in government, literature, education, and media; English remained important in higher administration, law, and commerce

culturalAchievements.zh: 现代孟加拉文学、诗歌、电影、民歌、巴乌尔传统、独立战争记忆文化以及国际母语日相关文化认同均具鲜明特色；服装制造与城市流行文化也塑造了新型社会身份
culturalAchievements.en: Modern Bangladeshi literature, poetry, cinema, folk music, Baul traditions, the memory culture of the Liberation War, and identity linked to International Mother Language Day were distinctive; garment production and urban popular culture also shaped new social identities

languageFamily.zh: 官方与主体语言孟加拉语属于印欧语系印度-雅利安语支，另有乌尔都语、查克玛语及多种少数民族语言
languageFamily.en: The official and majority language, Bengali, belongs to the Indo-European Indo-Aryan branch; Urdu, Chakma, and various minority languages were also present

gdpDescription.zh: 2000年孟加拉国经济仍属低收入发展中国家，但在人口规模、农业基础、海外汇款和成衣出口推动下维持增长。经济结构正在由传统农业逐步转向劳动密集型制造和服务业
gdpDescription.en: In 2000 Bangladesh remained a low-income developing economy, but sustained growth through its large population, agricultural base, remittances, and ready-made garment exports. Its structure was gradually shifting from traditional agriculture toward labor-intensive manufacturing and services

mainIndustries.zh: 成衣和纺织、黄麻及黄麻制品、农业、渔业、皮革、茶叶加工、食品加工、建筑、港口和运输服务
mainIndustries.en: Ready-made garments and textiles, jute and jute goods, agriculture, fisheries, leather, tea processing, food processing, construction, ports, and transport services

tradeGoods.zh: 主要出口服装、针织品、黄麻制品、冷冻水产品、皮革和茶叶；主要进口机械、棉花、石油、化肥、化工品、粮食和工业原料
tradeGoods.en: Major exports included garments, knitwear, jute products, frozen fish and shrimp, leather, and tea; major imports included machinery, cotton, petroleum, fertilizers, chemicals, food grains, and industrial inputs

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富总体有限，多数家庭依靠小规模农业、非正规劳动、海外劳务汇款或低工资工业就业维持生计；土地、住房和黄金饰品是常见储值形式
householdWealth.en: Household wealth was generally modest, with most families relying on small-scale farming, informal labor, remittances from overseas work, or low-wage industrial employment; land, housing, and gold jewelry were common stores of value

economicSystem.zh: 混合型市场经济，国家保留对宏观调控、基础设施和部分金融机构的较强影响，同时私营企业和出口导向工业迅速扩张
economicSystem.en: A mixed market economy in which the state retained substantial influence over macroeconomic management, infrastructure, and parts of the financial sector, while private enterprise and export-oriented industry expanded rapidly

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库规模有限，现金储备和外汇缓冲较脆弱，财政平衡部分依赖外援、优惠贷款与多边机构支持
treasuryDescription.en: The treasury remained limited in scale, with fragile cash reserves and foreign exchange buffers; fiscal balance depended partly on foreign aid, concessional loans, and support from multilateral institutions

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策以控制赤字、维持进口税收、扩大增值税基础并优先投入农村发展、教育和基础设施为主，但税基狭窄与征收能力不足构成长期限制
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy focused on containing the deficit, maintaining import-based revenues, broadening the VAT base, and prioritizing rural development, education, and infrastructure, though a narrow tax base and weak collection remained long-term constraints

description.zh: 军队主体，负责国土防御、边境支援、国内紧急状态应对和联合国维和任务，装备以轻重步兵、火炮和有限装甲力量为主
description.en: The core service, responsible for territorial defense, border support, domestic emergency response, and UN peacekeeping missions, equipped mainly with infantry, artillery, and limited armored forces

description.zh: 负责孟加拉湾海域巡逻、港口安全、近海防御和海上交通线保护，能力以近岸作战与巡逻为主
description.en: Responsible for Bay of Bengal patrols, port security, coastal defense, and protection of sea lines of communication, with capabilities centered on littoral warfare and patrol operations

description.zh: 承担空域监视、运输、近距离空中支援和有限防空任务，装备规模较小且现代化程度有限
description.en: Handled air surveillance, transport, close air support, and limited air defense missions, with a relatively small force and constrained modernization

description.zh: 包括边境防卫、步枪营和辅助安全力量，负责边界巡逻、反走私、内部安全和灾害救援支援
description.en: Included border guards, rifle battalions, and auxiliary security forces responsible for frontier patrol, anti-smuggling operations, internal security, and disaster-relief support

commanderInChief.zh: 总统沙阿布丁·艾哈迈德（名义三军统帅），政府实际由总理与军种指挥体系主导
commanderInChief.en: President Shahabuddin Ahmed as formal commander-in-chief, while practical direction rested with the prime minister and the service command structure

technology.zh: 军事技术处于发展中水平，装备多为冷战时期来源，依赖进口维护与有限升级；在通信、机动和海岸监视方面逐步改善
technology.en: Military technology stood at a developing level, with much equipment of Cold War origin and reliant on imported maintenance and limited upgrades; communications, mobility, and coastal surveillance were gradually improving

threats.zh: 主要安全挑战包括与印度的边界摩擦、走私与非法越境、海上资源争议、国内政治动荡风险以及洪水、气旋等非传统安全威胁
threats.en: Main security challenges included border frictions with India, smuggling and illegal crossings, maritime resource disputes, risks of domestic political unrest, and non-traditional threats such as floods and cyclones

populationDescription.zh: 全国人口极为稠密，集中分布于恒河—布拉马普特拉—梅格纳三角洲和平原地区；人口年轻，劳动力充足，但人均资源紧张
populationDescription.en: The population was extremely dense, concentrated in the Ganges-Brahmaputra-Meghna delta and plains; it was youthful and labor-abundant, though resources per person were strained

socialClasses.zh: 主要社会阶层包括农村小农与无地农民、城市非正规劳动者、成衣工人、公务员、教师与专业人士、中小企业主、大商人及政治家族；社会流动性存在，但贫困人口比例仍高
socialClasses.en: Major social classes included rural smallholders and landless peasants, urban informal laborers, garment workers, civil servants, teachers and professionals, small and medium business owners, large merchants, and political families; social mobility existed, but poverty remained widespread

allies.zh: 与印度保持重要而复杂的邻国关系；与南亚区域合作联盟成员、多数伊斯兰国家、日本、欧盟、美国和联合国体系维持合作，尤其依赖发展援助、贸易准入和劳务输出渠道
allies.en: Bangladesh maintained an important though complex relationship with India; it also cooperated with SAARC members, many Muslim-majority countries, Japan, the European Union, the United States, and the United Nations system, particularly for development aid, market access, and labor migration channels

enemies.zh: 2000年无正式国家敌国，但与部分邻国存在边界、移民、水资源和贸易争端，国内也警惕极端主义与跨境武装网络渗透
enemies.en: It had no formal state enemy in 2000, though disputes existed with some neighbors over borders, migration, water resources, and trade, while the state also remained wary of extremism and cross-border militant networks

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交政策强调不结盟传统、地区合作、发展援助吸引、对外劳务输出、联合国维和参与以及在伊斯兰世界与南亚之间维持平衡
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy emphasized a non-aligned tradition, regional cooperation, attracting development assistance, overseas labor deployment, participation in UN peacekeeping, and balancing ties between the Islamic world and South Asia

keyInnovations.zh: 关键发展包括灌溉农业扩张、高产稻种应用、微型信贷模式、电信网络起步扩展、成衣生产组织体系、公共卫生与非政府组织驱动的发展模式
keyInnovations.en: Key developments included the expansion of irrigated agriculture, use of high-yield rice varieties, microcredit models, the early spread of telecommunications networks, organized garment production systems, and public health and NGO-driven development approaches

strengths.zh: 优势在于人口规模庞大、劳动力成本低、农业韧性增强、成衣出口竞争力上升、侨汇与国际援助支撑明显，且政治制度在竞争性选举框架下总体运转
strengths.en: Its strengths lay in its large population, low labor costs, improved agricultural resilience, rising competitiveness in garment exports, and strong support from remittances and international aid, while the political system broadly functioned within a competitive electoral framework

weaknesses.zh: 弱点包括人均收入低、基础设施不足、税基狭窄、金融与行政能力有限、城市拥挤、腐败问题、能源约束以及对自然灾害高度脆弱
weaknesses.en: Weaknesses included low per capita income, insufficient infrastructure, a narrow tax base, limited financial and administrative capacity, urban overcrowding, corruption, energy constraints, and extreme vulnerability to natural disasters

outlook.zh: 若能维持政治稳定、扩大基础教育、改善治理并继续推动出口导向工业与农村发展，孟加拉国具有持续增长潜力；但若党争激化或灾害冲击加重，发展进程将明显受阻
outlook.en: If political stability could be maintained, basic education expanded, governance improved, and export-oriented industry and rural development continued, Bangladesh had strong potential for sustained growth; however, intensified partisan conflict or severe disaster shocks could significantly hinder progress

description.zh: 恒河三角洲人口稠密国家，以议会政治和制衣出口为特征。
description.en: A densely populated delta state marked by parliamentary politics and garment exports.

name.zh: 斯里兰卡、尼泊尔、不丹与马尔代夫联邦体
name.en: Confederation of Sri Lanka, Nepal, Bhutan, and the Maldives

ruler.zh: 多位国家元首与政府首脑（斯里兰卡总统钱德里卡·班达拉奈克·库马拉通加；尼泊尔国王比兰德拉；不丹国王吉格梅·辛格·旺楚克；马尔代夫总统马乌蒙·阿卜杜勒·加尧姆）
ruler.en: Various heads of state and government (Sri Lankan President Chandrika Bandaranaike Kumaratunga; King Birendra of Nepal; King Jigme Singye Wangchuck of Bhutan; Maldivian President Maumoon Abdul Gayoom)

capital.zh: 科伦坡、加德满都、廷布、马累

governmentForm.zh: 由共和制、君主立宪制与王权主导体制组成的松散地区性联邦体
governmentForm.en: A loose regional confederative grouping composed of a republic, constitutional-monarchical systems, and monarchy-led states

socialStructure.zh: 社会结构高度多样：斯里兰卡由僧伽罗人与泰米尔人主导并受内战影响；尼泊尔存在君主、政党、种姓与山地/特莱平原分层；不丹以王室、官僚与乡村社区为核心；马尔代夫则以岛屿社区、政府官员与服务业群体为主。
socialStructure.en: The social structure was highly diverse: Sri Lanka was shaped by a Sinhala-Tamil divide under civil war conditions; Nepal combined monarchy, party politics, caste, and hill-Terai hierarchies; Bhutan centered on the royal court, bureaucracy, and rural communities; and the Maldives was organized around island communities, state officials, and service-sector groups.

rulingClass.zh: 各国王室成员、民选总统与内阁、高级文官、军警高层、传统地主与商业精英
rulingClass.en: Royal families, elected presidents and cabinets, senior civil servants, military and police leadership, traditional landed elites, and commercial elites

succession.zh: 联邦体内部各国依本国制度运作：共和国实行选举继承，君主国实行王位世袭并辅以首相与内阁治理
succession.en: Succession varied by member state: republics used electoral succession, while monarchies followed hereditary royal succession alongside prime ministers and cabinet government

structure.zh: 此联邦体并非统一主权国家，而是基于地理与文明归类所形成的组合体。斯里兰卡为总统制共和国；尼泊尔2000年仍为君主立宪制下的多党体制；不丹为王权主导、渐进改革中的君主制；马尔代夫为总统制共和国，行政权集中。
structure.en: This confederation was not a single sovereign state but a grouped civilizational unit. Sri Lanka was a presidential republic; Nepal in 2000 remained a constitutional monarchy with a multiparty system; Bhutan was a monarchy under royal leadership and gradual reform; and the Maldives was a presidential republic with concentrated executive authority.

function.zh: 负责省、区、宗、岛屿及地方政府管理，维持治安、户籍、选举与地方协调
function.en: Managed provinces, districts, dzongkhags, islands, and local governments, while overseeing public order, civil registration, elections, and local coordination

function.zh: 负责预算、税收征管、国库、关税、援助资金协调及发展支出审计
function.en: Handled budgeting, tax collection, treasury management, customs, aid coordination, and auditing of development expenditure

function.zh: 统筹军队、警察、边防、海岸警备与反叛乱行动，尤其在斯里兰卡内战和尼泊尔毛派叛乱背景下作用突出
function.en: Coordinated the armed forces, police, border security, coast guard functions, and counterinsurgency operations, especially significant amid the Sri Lankan civil war and the Maoist insurgency in Nepal

function.zh: 负责与印度、中国、南亚区域合作联盟成员国以及联合国、世界银行等机构的外交与援助关系
function.en: Managed relations with India, China, SAARC member states, and institutions such as the United Nations and the World Bank

name.zh: 教育、宗教与文化事务部门

function.zh: 管理学校体系、寺院与宗教机构事务、语言政策、文化遗产和国家认同建设
function.en: Oversaw school systems, religious institutions, language policy, cultural heritage, and the construction of national identity

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政形式各异：斯里兰卡以省与区治理；尼泊尔以发展区、专区与村级机构运作；不丹以宗和格窝为核心；马尔代夫以环礁和岛屿行政为基础。整体行政能力不均衡，首都与核心地区明显强于偏远山区、战区与外岛。
localAdmin.en: Local administration varied widely: Sri Lanka governed through provinces and districts; Nepal through development regions, zones, and village-level bodies; Bhutan through dzongkhags and gewogs; and the Maldives through atolls and island administration. Administrative capacity was uneven overall, with capitals and core areas much stronger than remote mountain districts, war zones, and outer islands.

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系混合了英国殖民法传统、成文法、宗教法与王室敕令传统。斯里兰卡和马尔代夫受普通法与成文法影响较深；尼泊尔结合君主立宪法制与传统规范；不丹法律制度仍在现代化过程中。
legalSystem.en: The legal systems blended British colonial legal heritage, statutory law, religious norms, and royal decree traditions. Sri Lanka and the Maldives were strongly influenced by common-law and statutory models; Nepal combined constitutional monarchy law with traditional norms; and Bhutan’s legal order was still in the process of modernization.

taxationSystem.zh: 税制以进口关税、消费税、营业税、所得税、旅游相关收入和国有资源收益为主；不丹和尼泊尔对外援助依赖较高，马尔代夫对贸易和旅游收费依赖明显，斯里兰卡税基较广但受战争财政拖累。
taxationSystem.en: Taxation relied mainly on import duties, excise taxes, business taxes, income taxes, tourism-related revenues, and returns from state resources; Bhutan and Nepal were more aid-dependent, the Maldives depended heavily on trade and tourism charges, and Sri Lanka had a broader tax base but was burdened by war finance.

religion.zh: 宗教格局多元：上座部佛教在斯里兰卡和不丹居主导地位；尼泊尔兼具印度教与佛教传统；马尔代夫为逊尼派伊斯兰国家。宗教不仅是信仰体系，也是国家合法性、教育与社会秩序的重要基础。
religion.en: The religious landscape was diverse: Theravada Buddhism predominated in Sri Lanka and Bhutan; Nepal combined Hindu and Buddhist traditions; and the Maldives was a Sunni Muslim state. Religion served not only as a belief system but also as a major foundation of legitimacy, education, and social order.

philosophy.zh: 思想传统融合佛教伦理、印度教宇宙观、伊斯兰道德观、王权 paternalism、后殖民民族主义以及有限的自由民主与发展主义理念。
philosophy.en: Intellectual traditions blended Buddhist ethics, Hindu cosmology, Islamic moral thought, royal paternalism, postcolonial nationalism, and limited currents of liberal democracy and developmentalism.

writingSystem.zh: 书写系统多样，包括僧伽罗文、泰米尔文、尼泊尔文使用的天城文、宗卡文使用的藏文字母，以及马尔代夫迪维希语使用的塔安那文；英语在行政、教育与国际交往中也占重要地位。
writingSystem.en: Writing systems were varied, including Sinhala script, Tamil script, Devanagari for Nepali, Tibetan script for Dzongkha, and Thaana for Dhivehi; English also played an important role in administration, education, and international communication.

culturalAchievements.zh: 这一地区在2000年前后保有深厚文明遗产：斯里兰卡佛塔与巴利佛教传统、尼泊尔加德满都谷地寺庙与手工艺、不丹强调文化保护与“国民幸福总值”理念、马尔代夫发展出独特的海洋伊斯兰岛国文化与旅游形象。
culturalAchievements.en: By around 2000, the region retained a deep civilizational heritage: Sri Lanka’s stupas and Pali Buddhist traditions, Nepal’s Kathmandu Valley temples and artisanal culture, Bhutan’s emphasis on cultural preservation and Gross National Happiness, and the Maldives’ distinctive maritime Islamic island culture and tourism image.

languageFamily.zh: 语言家族复杂，包括印欧语系中的僧伽罗语、尼泊尔语和迪维希语，达罗毗荼语系中的泰米尔语，以及汉藏语系中的宗卡语等。
languageFamily.en: The language families were complex, including Indo-European languages such as Sinhala, Nepali, and Dhivehi, Dravidian languages such as Tamil, and Sino-Tibetan languages such as Dzongkha.

gdpDescription.zh: 综合经济规模以斯里兰卡为最大，其次为尼泊尔；不丹经济体量较小但水电潜力上升；马尔代夫人口少但旅游业创造较高人均收入。整体仍属中低收入发展中地区，受战争、地理阻隔和对外依赖制约。
gdpDescription.en: The combined economy was led by Sri Lanka, followed by Nepal; Bhutan’s economy was small but its hydropower potential was rising; and the Maldives had a small population but tourism generated relatively high per capita income. Overall, the region remained a lower-middle to low-income developing area constrained by war, geographic barriers, and external dependence.

mainIndustries.zh: 农业、茶叶与种植园经济、服装制造、旅游业、渔业、汇款经济、小规模制造、水电开发、手工业与公共服务
mainIndustries.en: Agriculture, tea and plantation production, garment manufacturing, tourism, fisheries, remittance-based activity, small-scale manufacturing, hydropower development, handicrafts, and public services

tradeGoods.zh: 茶叶、服装、橡胶、宝石、地毯、手工艺品、水产品、旅游服务、电力、农产品与劳务输出
tradeGoods.en: Tea, garments, rubber, gemstones, carpets, handicrafts, fish products, tourism services, electricity, agricultural goods, and exported labor services

name.zh: 多货币并存（斯里兰卡卢比、尼泊尔卢比、不丹努尔特鲁姆、马尔代夫拉菲亚）
name.en: Multiple currencies (Sri Lankan Rupee, Nepalese Rupee, Bhutanese Ngultrum, Maldivian Rufiyaa)

unitName.zh: 卢比／努尔特鲁姆／拉菲亚

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富总体有限，农村家庭主要持有土地、牲畜、住房和少量贵金属首饰；城市家庭财富更多表现为房产、小商业资产和海外汇款收入。马尔代夫旅游相关家庭收入明显高于地区平均。
householdWealth.en: Household wealth was generally modest, with rural families holding land, livestock, homes, and limited precious-metal jewelry; urban households more often possessed real estate, small business assets, and remittance income. Tourism-linked households in the Maldives earned well above the regional average.

economicSystem.zh: 以市场经济为主并伴随国家主导发展、外援依赖和保护性贸易安排的混合经济。斯里兰卡和尼泊尔较多参与国际金融体系，不丹实行谨慎开放，马尔代夫则强烈依赖旅游、进口与海运联系。
economicSystem.en: A mixed economy based on market activity combined with state-led development, aid dependence, and protective trade arrangements. Sri Lanka and Nepal were more integrated into international financial systems, Bhutan opened cautiously, and the Maldives depended heavily on tourism, imports, and maritime links.

source.zh: 旅游、国有企业与其他收入
source.en: Tourism, State Enterprises, and Other Revenue

treasuryDescription.zh: 财政储备有限且分散于各成员国中央银行与财政账户中。马尔代夫和不丹外汇缓冲较脆弱；尼泊尔和斯里兰卡需在进口、债务与安全开支之间维持平衡。
treasuryDescription.en: Fiscal reserves were limited and dispersed across the central banks and treasury accounts of the member states. Foreign-exchange buffers in the Maldives and Bhutan were relatively fragile, while Nepal and Sri Lanka had to balance imports, debt, and security expenditure.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策总体偏谨慎但受冲突与发展需求挤压。各国依赖关税、间接税和外援维持支出，战时斯里兰卡安全开支偏高，尼泊尔和不丹则倾向发展导向型预算，马尔代夫重视旅游和进口税收。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy was generally cautious but strained by conflict and development needs. Governments relied on tariffs, indirect taxes, and aid to sustain expenditure; wartime Sri Lanka had elevated security spending, Nepal and Bhutan favored development-oriented budgeting, and the Maldives emphasized tourism and import taxation.

description.zh: 包括斯里兰卡陆军、尼泊尔皇家陆军、不丹皇家军队和马尔代夫国家安全机构中的陆上力量；主要承担反叛乱、边境巡控、要地防御和国内维稳任务。
description.en: Included the Sri Lanka Army, Royal Nepal Army, Royal Bhutan Army, and land-based components of Maldivian security forces; their main roles were counterinsurgency, border patrol, strategic defense, and internal security.

name.zh: 海军、海岸警卫与海上巡逻部队
name.en: Navy, Coast Guard, and Maritime Patrol Forces

description.zh: 以斯里兰卡海军和马尔代夫海上安全力量最为重要，负责海上补给线、渔业海域、反走私与岛屿巡逻。
description.en: Most important were the Sri Lanka Navy and Maldivian maritime security forces, responsible for sea lines of communication, fisheries zones, anti-smuggling work, and island patrols.

description.zh: 由斯里兰卡空军和尼泊尔、不丹、马尔代夫的小规模航空力量组成，承担运输、侦察、近距支援、救灾和山区补给任务。
description.en: Consisted of the Sri Lanka Air Force and smaller aviation arms in Nepal, Bhutan, and the Maldives, carrying out transport, reconnaissance, close support, disaster relief, and mountain resupply.

name.zh: 警察预备队、准军事与后备力量
name.en: Police Reserves, Paramilitary, and Reserve Forces

description.zh: 包括特警、武装警察、乡村防卫与后备役单位，在反恐、城市保卫和紧急动员中发挥作用。
description.en: Included special police, armed police, rural defense, and reserve units that played roles in counterterrorism, urban defense, and emergency mobilization.

commanderInChief.zh: 各成员国国家元首与国防机构分别统辖；战时斯里兰卡总统和尼泊尔国王拥有核心军事权威
commanderInChief.en: Command rested separately with each member state's head of state and defense institutions; in wartime, the Sri Lankan president and the King of Nepal held especially important military authority

technology.zh: 军事技术总体处于中低水平，以轻武器、迫击炮、装甲输送车、巡逻舰、运输机和少量攻击机为主。斯里兰卡因内战而实战经验丰富，但装备现代化有限；尼泊尔偏重山地步兵；不丹和马尔代夫军力规模较小。
technology.en: Military technology was generally at a low-to-mid level, centered on small arms, mortars, armored personnel carriers, patrol craft, transport aircraft, and a limited number of attack aircraft. Sri Lanka had significant combat experience due to civil war but limited modernization; Nepal emphasized mountain infantry; Bhutan and the Maldives maintained small forces.

threats.zh: 主要威胁来自内部冲突而非传统国家间战争：斯里兰卡面临猛虎组织武装挑战，尼泊尔遭遇毛派叛乱升级；此外还有海上走私、边境管理脆弱、政局不稳和对印度安全环境的高度敏感。
threats.en: The main threats came from internal conflict rather than conventional interstate war: Sri Lanka faced the LTTE insurgency, and Nepal was confronting an escalating Maoist rebellion. Additional concerns included maritime smuggling, weak border management, political instability, and strong sensitivity to India’s security environment.

populationDescription.zh: 总人口约3200万，其中斯里兰卡约1900万、尼泊尔约2300万、不丹约60万、马尔代夫约27万；该合并估算为文明单元取整值。人口分布极不均衡，集中于斯里兰卡湿区与尼泊尔山谷、平原地带，而不丹山区和马尔代夫外岛较为分散。
populationDescription.en: The total population was about 32 million, including roughly 19 million in Sri Lanka, 23 million in Nepal, 0.6 million in Bhutan, and 0.27 million in the Maldives; this combined figure is a rounded civilizational grouping estimate. Population distribution was highly uneven, concentrated in Sri Lanka’s wetter zones and Nepal’s valleys and plains, while Bhutan’s mountains and the Maldives’ outer islands were much more dispersed.

socialClasses.zh: 社会阶层包括王室与政治精英、官僚与军警、僧侣和宗教人士、城市中产与商人、农民、种植园劳工、渔民、手工业者以及贫困山区和冲突地区居民。尼泊尔种姓与族群结构仍深刻影响社会机会，斯里兰卡族群分裂尤为突出。
socialClasses.en: Social classes included royal and political elites, bureaucrats and security officers, monks and religious figures, urban middle classes and merchants, peasants, plantation laborers, fishers, artisans, and poor residents of mountain and conflict zones. Caste and ethnic structures continued to shape opportunity in Nepal, while ethnic division was especially pronounced in Sri Lanka.

allies.zh: 普遍与印度保持最重要的地区关系，同时接受来自中国、日本、英国、美国、联合国机构和多边开发银行的援助与合作；不丹与印度关系尤为紧密，马尔代夫在南亚与伊斯兰世界保持友好联系。
allies.en: All generally maintained their most important regional relationship with India, while also receiving aid and cooperation from China, Japan, the United Kingdom, the United States, UN agencies, and multilateral development banks; Bhutan’s ties with India were especially close, and the Maldives also maintained friendly links with South Asia and the Islamic world.

enemies.zh: 没有共同意义上的正式国家敌国，但各国内部存在严重安全对手：斯里兰卡政府与泰米尔伊拉姆猛虎解放组织激烈对抗，尼泊尔政府与毛派反叛力量冲突加剧。外交上需谨慎避免卷入大国竞争。
enemies.en: There were no shared formal enemy states in the conventional sense, but serious internal adversaries existed: the Sri Lankan government was in intense conflict with the Liberation Tigers of Tamil Eelam, and the Nepalese government faced growing confrontation with Maoist rebels. Diplomatically, these states sought to avoid entanglement in major-power rivalry.

foreignPolicy.zh: 对外政策以小国平衡、发展优先、争取援助、不结盟传统和地区合作为核心，主要通过南亚区域合作联盟、联合国和双边关系维护主权与发展空间。在中印之间多采取谨慎务实路线。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy centered on small-state balancing, development first, aid acquisition, nonaligned traditions, and regional cooperation, using SAARC, the United Nations, and bilateral ties to protect sovereignty and development space. Most pursued a cautious and pragmatic line between India and China.

keyInnovations.zh: 关键技术与制度发展主要包括山区道路与桥梁建设、农村电气化、水电工程、旅游基础设施、移动通信的初步扩展、服装制造与出口加工、海岛交通与海水淡化设施，以及不丹“国民幸福总值”作为治理理念创新。
keyInnovations.en: Key technological and institutional developments included mountain roads and bridges, rural electrification, hydropower works, tourism infrastructure, the early spread of mobile communications, garment manufacturing and export processing, island transport and desalination facilities, and Bhutan’s Gross National Happiness as an innovation in governance philosophy.

strengths.zh: 优势在于战略位置重要、文明传统深厚、社会韧性较强、旅游和水电等特色资源明显，并能在印度洋航道、喜马拉雅山地与南亚区域合作框架中发挥地缘价值。教育与卫生在部分成员国相对优于同收入水平国家。
strengths.en: Strengths included important strategic location, deep civilizational heritage, considerable social resilience, and distinctive assets such as tourism and hydropower, allowing geopolitical relevance across the Indian Ocean sea lanes, the Himalayan zone, and SAARC cooperation. Education and health outcomes in some member states were relatively strong for their income level.

weaknesses.zh: 弱点在于政治碎片化、经济规模有限、基础设施不足、对进口和外援依赖较深、地理隔绝显著，以及严重的内部冲突与族群紧张。斯里兰卡内战和尼泊尔叛乱直接削弱财政、投资与社会稳定。
weaknesses.en: Weaknesses included political fragmentation, limited economic scale, inadequate infrastructure, strong dependence on imports and aid, significant geographic isolation, and serious internal conflict and ethnic tension. The Sri Lankan civil war and Nepalese insurgency directly undermined finance, investment, and social stability.

outlook.zh: 2000年前后的前景谨慎而分化：若冲突缓和并持续推进改革、教育、旅游和基础设施建设，则斯里兰卡、尼泊尔、不丹和马尔代夫都具备改善人均收入与国际联系的潜力；但若内战、王权危机、叛乱或外部经济冲击加深，整体发展将长期受阻。
outlook.en: The outlook around 2000 was cautious and uneven: if conflict eased and reforms, education, tourism, and infrastructure continued, Sri Lanka, Nepal, Bhutan, and the Maldives all had potential to improve per capita income and international connectivity; but if civil war, monarchical crisis, insurgency, or external economic shocks intensified, development would remain seriously constrained.

description.zh: 包括内战中的斯里兰卡、君主制尼泊尔与不丹，以及海洋岛国马尔代夫。
description.en: Including civil-war-era Sri Lanka, the monarchies of Nepal and Bhutan, and the island state of the Maldives.

governmentForm.zh: 联邦半总统制共和国；2000年实际上正从叶利钦时代向以总统权力强化为核心的普京时代过渡
governmentForm.en: Federal semi-presidential republic; in 2000 it was transitioning from the Yeltsin era toward the Putin era centered on stronger presidential authority

socialStructure.zh: 社会以城市居民、工业与服务业劳动者、国家公务员、企业管理层、寡头资本集团、军警系统人员、农村居民和退休人口构成；后苏联转型造成显著贫富分化
socialStructure.en: Society consisted of urban residents, industrial and service workers, state employees, business managers, oligarchic capital groups, military and security personnel, rural inhabitants, and a large retiree population; the post-Soviet transition produced pronounced inequality

rulingClass.zh: 联邦总统及总统办公厅、高级官僚、地区行政长官、联邦议会领导层、安全机构精英、大型国有与私有能源金融集团构成核心统治阶层
rulingClass.en: The core ruling class consisted of the federal president and presidential administration, senior bureaucrats, regional governors, parliamentary leaders, security-service elites, and major state and private energy-financial groups

succession.zh: 总统由全民直选产生，任期四年；如总统不能履职，由总理代行职权并依宪法安排选举
succession.en: The president was elected by popular vote for a four-year term; if the president could not serve, the prime minister would act in office and elections would be arranged according to the constitution

structure.zh: 联邦政府由总统、总理领导的政府、联邦会议两院（联邦委员会与国家杜马）、联邦法院体系及89个联邦主体组成；2000年中央正着手加强对地方与寡头的控制
structure.en: The federal government consisted of the president, the government headed by the prime minister, the bicameral Federal Assembly (Federation Council and State Duma), the federal court system, and 89 federal subjects; in 2000 the center was beginning to strengthen control over regions and oligarchs

function.zh: 协助总统制定政策、协调联邦机构、管理人事任命与国家安全议程
function.en: Assisted the president in policy formation, coordination of federal organs, management of appointments, and national security agendas

function.zh: 编制预算、管理联邦财政、税收政策与国债
function.en: Prepared the budget and managed federal finances, tax policy, and public debt

function.zh: 管理武装力量、军事计划、装备采购与动员体系
function.en: Managed the armed forces, military planning, procurement, and mobilization systems

function.zh: 负责警务、国内治安、部分准军事内卫力量与犯罪打击
function.en: Handled policing, domestic order, some paramilitary internal troops, and crime control

function.zh: 执行外交政策、维护驻外使团与国际谈判
function.en: Conducted foreign policy, maintained diplomatic missions abroad, and managed international negotiations

name.en: Ministry of Economic Development and Trade

function.zh: 统筹宏观经济改革、贸易政策、投资与私有化后续调整
function.en: Coordinated macroeconomic reform, trade policy, investment, and post-privatization adjustments

function.zh: 监督法律行政事务、监狱系统与法规登记
function.en: Oversaw legal administrative affairs, the prison system, and registration of regulations

function.zh: 负责反间谍、反恐、国内安全与国家重点设施保护
function.en: Responsible for counterintelligence, counterterrorism, domestic security, and protection of strategic facilities

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政分为共和国、边疆区、州、联邦直辖市、自治州和自治区等联邦主体；2000年开始设立联邦区与总统全权代表以加强中央监督
localAdmin.en: Local administration was divided among republics, krais, oblasts, federal cities, an autonomous oblast, and autonomous okrugs; in 2000 federal districts and presidential plenipotentiaries were introduced to tighten central oversight

legalSystem.zh: 以大陆法系为基础，依据1993年宪法建立宪法法院、最高法院和普通法院体系；法律执行受腐败、地方势力与安全形势影响
legalSystem.en: Based on the civil law tradition, with a Constitutional Court, Supreme Court, and ordinary court system under the 1993 Constitution; enforcement was affected by corruption, local power structures, and security conditions

taxationSystem.zh: 主要税源包括增值税、企业利润税、个人所得税、关税、消费税和自然资源相关收入；2000年前后正推进税制简化与联邦征收能力提升
taxationSystem.en: Main revenues came from VAT, corporate profit tax, personal income tax, customs duties, excises, and natural-resource-related income; around 2000 the state was simplifying the tax system and improving federal collection capacity

religion.zh: 俄罗斯东正教为主要宗教并在国家认同中重新上升；同时存在伊斯兰教、佛教、犹太教、天主教、新教及世俗无神论传统
religion.en: Russian Orthodoxy was the principal religion and was reemerging in national identity; Islam, Buddhism, Judaism, Catholicism, Protestantism, and secular atheistic traditions were also present

philosophy.zh: 公共思想融合俄罗斯民族主义、国家主义、东正教复兴、后苏联现实主义以及保留部分苏联社会保障观念的市场转型思路
philosophy.en: Public thought blended Russian nationalism, statism, Orthodox revival, post-Soviet realism, and market-transition ideas that retained some Soviet notions of social protection

writingSystem.zh: 以西里尔字母书写俄语；联邦内若干民族语言亦使用西里尔字母或其他本地文字系统
writingSystem.en: Russian was written in the Cyrillic script; several minority languages in the federation also used Cyrillic or other local writing systems

culturalAchievements.zh: 拥有世界级文学、音乐、芭蕾、戏剧、电影、航天与科学传统；到2000年，后苏联文化在市场化媒体、流行音乐和电视产业中快速重组
culturalAchievements.en: It possessed world-class traditions in literature, music, ballet, theater, cinema, space exploration, and science; by 2000 post-Soviet culture was rapidly reorganizing through market media, pop music, and television industries

languageFamily.zh: 官方语言俄语属印欧语系斯拉夫语族东斯拉夫语支；国内另有突厥、乌拉尔、东北高加索等多语族语言
languageFamily.en: The official language, Russian, belonged to the Indo-European family, Slavic branch, East Slavic group; the country also contained Turkic, Uralic, Northeast Caucasian, and other language families

gdpDescription.zh: 2000年的俄罗斯经济已走出1998年金融危机最严重阶段，受卢布贬值、油价回升和工业复苏推动恢复增长，但总体规模仍明显低于苏联晚期经济总量与主要西方大国
gdpDescription.en: In 2000 Russia had emerged from the worst phase of the 1998 financial crisis, recovering through ruble devaluation, rising oil prices, and industrial revival, though its overall scale remained well below the late Soviet economy and the major Western powers

mainIndustries.zh: 石油、天然气、冶金、军工、机械制造、化工、电力、铁路运输、木材加工、核工业与基础科研
mainIndustries.en: Oil, natural gas, metallurgy, defense industry, machine building, chemicals, electric power, rail transport, timber processing, nuclear industry, and basic scientific research

tradeGoods.zh: 出口以原油、成品油、天然气、金属、化肥、木材和军工产品为主；进口以机械设备、消费品、药品、食品和电子产品为主
tradeGoods.en: Exports were dominated by crude oil, refined petroleum, natural gas, metals, fertilizers, timber, and defense products; imports included machinery, consumer goods, medicines, foodstuffs, and electronics

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富分布极不均衡；少数寡头和新兴金融工业精英掌握巨额资产，而大量家庭依赖工资、养老金与小规模副业维持生活
householdWealth.en: Household wealth was highly unequal; a small group of oligarchs and new financial-industrial elites held vast assets, while many households relied on wages, pensions, and small side activities

economicSystem.zh: 以市场经济为主、能源资源导向并带有强烈寡头资本和国家干预特征的后苏联混合经济
economicSystem.en: A post-Soviet mixed economy centered on markets and resource exports, marked by strong oligarchic capital and significant state intervention

source.en: Customs duties and foreign trade taxes

source.zh: 能源与自然资源相关收入

category.zh: 交通、工业与其他行政支出
category.en: Transport, industry, and other administrative spending

treasuryDescription.zh: 联邦财政在1998年危机后仍较脆弱，但受益于油价回升和财政整顿，现金流与预算纪律开始改善；外汇与贵金属储备正在恢复
treasuryDescription.en: Federal finances were still fragile after the 1998 crisis, but rising oil prices and fiscal consolidation improved cash flow and budget discipline; foreign exchange and precious-metal reserves were recovering

fiscalPolicy.zh: 政策重点在于平衡预算、提高税收征管、压缩拖欠、限制地区财政分散，并利用能源收入恢复国家偿付能力
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy emphasized balanced budgets, stronger tax collection, reduction of arrears, limiting regional fiscal fragmentation, and using energy revenues to restore state solvency

description.zh: 负责欧洲俄罗斯、高加索、西伯利亚与远东方向的地面作战，装备以苏制坦克、火炮和机械化部队为主，整体处于缩编与整编阶段
description.en: Responsible for land warfare in European Russia, the Caucasus, Siberia, and the Far East, equipped mainly with Soviet-designed tanks, artillery, and mechanized units, and undergoing downsizing and reorganization

description.zh: 拥有北方舰队、太平洋舰队、波罗的海舰队、黑海舰队和里海区舰队，保留战略核潜艇与有限远洋能力，但受经费与维护不足制约
description.en: Maintained the Northern, Pacific, Baltic, Black Sea, and Caspian flotilla forces, retaining strategic nuclear submarines and limited blue-water capability, though constrained by funding and maintenance shortfalls

description.zh: 承担制空、战略轰炸、空运与防空支援任务，拥有大量继承自苏联的战机与轰炸机，但可用率和训练水平不均
description.en: Handled air superiority, strategic bombing, airlift, and air defense support, with many aircraft inherited from the Soviet Union, though readiness and training quality were uneven

description.zh: 俄罗斯核威慑核心，掌握洲际弹道导弹部队，是大国地位与安全政策的支柱
description.en: The core of Russia’s nuclear deterrent, controlling intercontinental ballistic missile forces and serving as a pillar of great-power status and security policy

description.zh: 高度机动精锐部队，用于快速部署、纵深打击与车臣等局部战争行动
description.en: Highly mobile elite troops used for rapid deployment, deep strike, and operations in local wars such as Chechnya

name.zh: 内务部内卫部队及其他准军事力量
name.en: Internal Troops of the MVD and other paramilitary forces

description.zh: 负责国内安全、设施警备、反叛乱与反恐任务，在第二次车臣战争中承担重要作用
description.en: Responsible for internal security, infrastructure protection, counterinsurgency, and counterterrorism, playing an important role in the Second Chechen War

commanderInChief.zh: 总统兼武装力量最高统帅弗拉基米尔·普京
commanderInChief.en: President and Supreme Commander-in-Chief Vladimir Putin

technology.zh: 军事实力以苏联遗产为基础，拥有核武器、洲际导弹、先进防空系统、主战坦克、攻击机和核潜艇；但常规部队在通信、精确制导、维护、后勤和职业化方面明显落后于美国
technology.en: Military capability was based on the Soviet inheritance, including nuclear weapons, ICBMs, advanced air defense systems, main battle tanks, attack aircraft, and nuclear submarines; however, conventional forces lagged well behind the United States in communications, precision strike, maintenance, logistics, and professionalization

threats.zh: 主要威胁包括北高加索分离主义与恐怖主义、车臣战争、北约东扩带来的安全焦虑、边境走私和周边地区不稳定
threats.en: Main threats included separatism and terrorism in the North Caucasus, the Chechen war, security anxieties over NATO enlargement, border smuggling, and instability in neighboring regions

populationDescription.zh: 2000年俄罗斯人口约1.46亿，整体受低生育率、高死亡率、公共卫生危机和移民流动影响，人口增长停滞并出现长期下降趋势
populationDescription.en: Russia’s population in 2000 was about 146 million, shaped by low fertility, high mortality, public health problems, and migration flows, with growth stagnant and a long-term decline underway

socialClasses.zh: 主要包括国家官僚与安全精英、寡头和大企业主、中产专业人士、工人阶层、农村居民、退休者、失业与半失业人口，以及各共和国和边疆地区的少数民族社群
